Our results show major changes in GitHub over the last decade: (1) the consolidation of README.md, .gitignore, and LICENSE as standard artifacts; (2) the rise of GitHub Actions as the dominant CI/CD platform; (3) the growth of configuration formats such as TOML, YAML, and JSON, alongside a decline in XML; (4) new trends, such as the growth of Dockerfile; and (5) emerging content related to LLMs and generative AI (e.g., AGENTS.md). Based on our findings, we discuss implications, including that open source is not only evolving organically but also increasingly guided by GitHub's standards, the rise and fall of technologies, and the potential support for mining software repository studies.

</details>


### [437] [AI Policy, Disclosure, and Human in the Loop: How Are Contribution Guidelines Adapting to GenAI?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16706)
*Andre Hora,Romain Robbes*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究对1000个GitHub仓库进行实证分析，发现78%的项目允许AI辅助贡献，51%要求披露AI使用，74%要求人工参与，整体上开源社区对生成式AI持积极态度但强调透明度和人工监督。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI正在改变软件开发，开源项目开始制定AI使用政策，但目前缺乏对这些政策的具体规定和最佳实践的系统性了解。

Method: 对1000个热门GitHub仓库进行实证分析，从中识别出118份AI贡献者政策，并进行分类统计。

Result: (1) 78%允许AI生成贡献，22%明确不鼓励；(2) 51%要求披露AI生成的内容；(3) 74%要求人工参与贡献流程。

Conclusion: 大多数开源项目对GenAI持积极态度，但AI披露和人工参与是贡献过程的基本要求，对开发者和研究人员具有重要启示。

Abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) has recently transformed software development. Due to the ease of generating code, open source projects are experiencing a growth in contributions. To address the rise of GenAI, open source projects have begun implementing policies for AI usage in contributions. However, the extent to which open source specifies whether AI-assisted contributions are allowed or prohibited, along with the best practices for contributors, remains unclear. This paper provides an initial empirical study to explore how open source projects are adapting to GenAI contributions. We analyzed 1,000 popular GitHub repositories and identified 118 AI policies for contributors. Our results show that (1) 78% of the AI policies allow contributions generated with GenAI, while 22% explicitly discourage their use; (2) 51% of the AI policies require the disclosure of AI-generated contributions; and (3) 74% of the AI policies require a human in the loop during contribution. Overall, we find that the majority of the analyzed AI policies are positive regarding the usage of GenAI. However, AI disclosure and human in the loop are fundamental in the contribution process. Finally, we conclude by discussing implications for developers and researchers.

</details>


### [438] [Low-Code Paradox in DevOps: Security and Governance Insights from Practitioners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16971)
*Muhammad Azeem Akbar,Saima Rafi,Arif Ali Khan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 通过12场半结构化访谈，研究发现低代码开发平台在DevOps环境中虽能自动化任务，但显著增加了安全风险与治理挑战，亟需建立安全意识和稳健的治理实践。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DevOps与低代码平台的结合日益普及，但学术界和业界对两者融合带来的安全与治理问题关注不足，缺乏从实践者视角的深入理解。

Method: 采用扎根理论方法，对12名具备低代码和DevOps经验的IT从业者进行半结构化访谈，通过编码和主题归纳进行定性分析。

Result: 低代码平台确实能自动化部分DevOps任务，但同时也放大了安全漏洞、合规缺失和治理权责不明等问题，需要更强的安全文化和制度性实践来应对。

Conclusion: DevOps与低代码平台的交汇点需要谨慎治理和主动安全实践，组织必须在赋能开发的同时保障系统的韧性、合规性及开发者需求。

Abstract: DevOps has become a dominant paradigm in modern software engineering, while low-code development platforms (LCDPs) are increasingly adopted to streamline software development. The integration of these approaches promises efficiency gains but also raises critical concerns regarding security and governance. Despite their growing use, insufficient attention has been given to the implications of these platforms for security and governance in DevOps environments. This study investigates practitioners perspectives on the security and governance implications of LCDPs in DevOps environments. Twelve semi-structured interviews were conducted with IT professionals experienced in low-code and DevOps practices. The data were analyzed using a grounded theory approach to identify emergent themes. Findings reveal that LCDPs help automate tasks; however, they also increase security risks and governance challenges, highlighting the need for robust practices and a security-conscious culture. This study suggests that the intersection of DevOps and LCDPs requires careful governance and proactive security practices. Addressing these issues is essential for organizations to unlock the potential of LCDPs while safeguarding resilience, compliance, and developer needs.

</details>


### [439] [Task Abstention for Large Language Models in Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17029)
*Yanke Zhou,Yuhao Tan,Senrong Xu,Zenan Li,Yuan Yao,Taolue Chen,Xiaoxing Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多重假设检验的校准式弃权规则，用于判断LLM是否应避免执行特定代码生成任务以防止幻觉，通过代码执行结果评估生成一致性，无需依赖测试用例或外部数据库，并提供严格的分布无关理论保障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在自动代码生成中存在严重的"幻觉"问题，即生成看似合理但功能不正确的代码。现有方法缺乏可靠的机制来判断模型何时应放弃生成任务以避免错误输出。

Method: 提出校准式弃权规则，基于多重假设检验原理，通过代码执行结果（如测试运行）评估生成的一致性，处理语义等价代码的语法多样性，无需oracle测试用例或外部数据库。

Result: 在多个基准数据集和开源代码LLM上的实验表明，该方法比现有技术更准确、更高效地识别并弃权易产生幻觉的任务。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一个严格的、分布无关的理论保障，为更安全、更稳健的代码生成提供了可靠机制。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have revolutionized automated code generation. One serious concern, however, is the so-called ``hallucination'', i.e., LLMs may generate seemingly plausible but functionally incorrect code. In this paper, we study the task abstention problem, i.e., determining whether a given LLM should abstain from performing a specific code generation task to avoid likely hallucination. Our approach features a calibrated abstention rule, grounded in the principles of multiple hypothesis testing. The rule assesses generation consistency through code execution outcomes, allowing it to handle syntactic diversity of semantically equivalent code without reliance on oracle test cases or external databases. We prove that our approach provides a rigorous, distribution-free theoretical guarantee on its abstention decisions. We evaluate our method on benchmark datasets using several open-source code LLMs. Results show that our method allows generative models to more accurately and efficiently identify and abstain from tasks that induce hallucination compared to existing techniques, providing a reliable mechanism for safer and more robust code generation.

</details>


### [440] [Beyond Execution: Static-Analysis Rewards and Hint-Conditioned Diffusion RL for Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17174)
*Shuyin Ouyang,Zhaozhi Qian,Faroq AL-Tam,Muhammad AL-Qurishi,Jie M. Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了扩散语言模型在代码生成中的强化学习后训练问题，重点关注奖励设计、提示条件采样和任务难度三个维度。发现静态检查是最有效的免执行奖励，可显著提升模型性能（HumanEval上从53.9提升至67.1），同时减少9.4%的推理时间。中等AST提示在困难任务上效果最佳，而奖励设计的最优选择强烈依赖于任务难度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散语言模型在复杂代码生成任务中面临"能力悬崖"问题——基于执行的语义奖励信号变得过低，无法提供有效的学习信号。作者旨在通过系统实证研究，探索如何通过奖励设计和训练引导来缓解这一问题。

Method: 沿着三个轴进行系统实证研究：1) 奖励设计（静态检查、相似度奖励等免执行奖励 vs.传统单元测试执行奖励）；2) 训练时提示条件扩散采样；3) 任务难度。在HumanEval、MBPP和LiveCodeBench三个基准上评估，以DiffuCoder为基线模型。

Result: 静态检查是最强的整体免执行奖励，将DiffuCoder在HumanEval上从53.9提升至67.1，在LiveCodeBench上从14.9提升至15.5，同时减少9.4%的推理时间。中等AST提示在困难基准上效果最佳。相似度奖励在简单子集上更有效，静态检查在困难子集上更可靠。

Conclusion: 奖励设计和训练引导显著影响扩散RL在代码生成中的性能。最优策略依赖于任务难度，为实际应用中选择合适的奖励机制和训练策略提供了指导。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is an important paradigm for aligning Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) toward functional correctness in code generation. However, these models often encounter a ``capability cliff'' on complex tasks, where execution-based semantic rewards become too low to provide a viable learning signal. In this paper, we present a systematic empirical study of RL post-training for diffusion-based code generation along three axes: reward design, hint-conditioned sampling, and task difficulty. We investigate the effectiveness of execution-free rewards as alternatives to traditional unit-test execution, the role of training-time hint-conditioned diffusion sampling in mitigating exploration bottlenecks, and the impact of these design choices varies across tasks with different difficulty levels. Across HumanEval, MBPP, and LiveCodeBench, we find that static checking is the strongest overall standalone execution-free reward in our setting, especially improving DiffuCoder from 53.9 to 67.1 on HumanEval and from 14.9 to 15.5 on LiveCodeBench while reducing rollout time by 9.4\%. We further find that moderate AST-based hinting is most useful on harder benchmarks, while the best reward design depends strongly on task difficulty: similarity-based rewards are more effective on easier subsets, whereas static checking is more reliable on harder subsets where execution rewards are low. These findings suggest that reward design and training guidance substantially affect diffusion RL performance in our evaluated code-generation setting.

</details>


### [441] [From Runnable to Shippable: Multi-Agent Test-Driven Development for Generating Full-Stack Web Applications from Requirements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17242)
*Yuxuan Wan,Tingshuo Liang,Jiakai Xu,Jingyu Xiao,Yintong Huo,Michael R Lyu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: TDDev框架通过将自然语言需求转化为结构化验收测试、自动化浏览器交互验证和失败报告生成，实现了Web应用生成的测试驱动开发闭环。实验表明，TDD基础设施可将生成质量提升34-48个百分点，但最佳协议取决于模型生成风格：整体式构建模型适合代理强执行，保守扩展模型适合增量执行，错误匹配会消除TDD收益并导致25倍的token成本增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有编码代理生成的Web应用在70%以上情况下无法满足功能需求，核心困难在于Web正确性评估需要部署、浏览器交互模拟和失败信号转化，这些步骤当前无法在没有人工干预的情况下自动完成。

Method: 提出了TDDev框架，包含三个阶段：(1)将高层次需求转化为结构化验收测试；(2)部署应用并通过基于浏览器的交互模拟进行验证；(3)将浏览器观察到的失败转化为结构化的修复报告提供给编码代理。基于该框架，首次对Web应用生成的TDD策略进行了受控实证研究，比较了四种开发协议、两种编码代理、两种骨干模型和两种基准。

Result: TDD基础设施一致地将生成质量提升34-48个百分点。最优协议取决于模型的生成风格：整体式构建模型受益于代理强执行，保守扩展模型受益于增量执行。协议与风格不匹配会完全消除TDD收益，并将token成本增加高达25倍。用户研究确认TDDev将手动开发干预减少到零。

Conclusion: 测试驱动开发对Web应用生成有效，但协议选择必须与模型生成风格匹配，否则不仅无效还会造成巨大成本浪费。TDDev实现了从持续提示工程到自主反馈驱动精炼的工作负载转移。

Abstract: Coding agents can generate web applications from natural-language descriptions, yet a recent benchmark study shows that generated applications fail to meet functional requirements in over 70% of cases. The core difficulty is that web correctness cannot be assessed from source files or terminal output: the application must be deployed, exercised through simulated browser interactions, and failures must be translated into actionable repair signals -- steps that current agents cannot perform without human mediation.
  We present TDDev, a framework that automates this closed loop through three stages: (1) converting high-level requirements into structured acceptance tests before any code is written, (2) deploying the application and validating it through browser-based interaction simulation, and (3) translating browser-observed failures into structured repair reports for the coding agent. Enabled by TDDev, we conduct the first controlled empirical study of Test-driven development (TDD) strategies for web application generation, comparing four development protocols across two coding agents, two backbone models, and two benchmarks. TDD infrastructure consistently improves generation quality by 34--48 percentage points over a no-TDD baseline. The central finding is that the optimal protocol depends on the model's generation style: models that build applications holistically benefit most from agentic enforcement, while models that extend code conservatively benefit from incremental enforcement. Mismatching protocol to generation style eliminates the TDD benefit entirely while multiplying token cost up to 25-fold. A user study confirms that TDDev reduces manual developer intervention to zero, shifting the workload from continuous prompt engineering to autonomous, feedback-driven refinement.

</details>


### [442] [Rover: Context-aware Conflict Resolution with LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17279)
*Qingyu Zhang,Junzhe Li,Jiayi Lin,Changhua Luo,Chenxiong Qian*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Rover是一个结合程序分析与大语言模型的新型冲突解决系统，通过多层代码属性图（MtCPG）捕获跨文件依赖，利用图连通性算法聚类冲突代码，在冲突解决任务上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码合并冲突解决方法存在不足：程序分析缺乏推断开发者意图的能力，只能保守地将未解决冲突留给人工处理；基于模型的方法因上下文感知不足，难以处理涉及复杂代码依赖的冲突。

Method: 提出多层代码属性图（MtCPG）表示跨文件依赖关系，结合图连通性算法对冲突代码及相关更改进行有意义的聚类，生成上下文感知的提示，引导LLM生成准确解决方案。

Result: 在字符级、词汇级和语义级相似度上，Rover的冲突解决效果均优于独立LLM、机器学习基线MergeGen及建议提供工具WizardMerge。

Conclusion: 融合程序分析与LLM的混合方法能有效提升代码合并冲突解决的准确性，上下文感知是关键。

Abstract: Code merging is a significant challenge, particularly in large-scale projects. Existing solutions, including program analysis and machine learning, show promise but face critical limitations. Program analysis lacks the ability to infer developers' intentions, relying on conservative strategies that offload unresolved conflicts for manual handling. Meanwhile, model-based approaches struggle with conflicts involving complex code dependencies due to insufficient contextual awareness. To address these gaps, we introduce Rover, a novel conflict resolution system that integrates program analysis with large language models (LLMs). To obtain context-aware prompts, we propose Multi-layer Code Property Graph (MtCPG), a new representation capturing inter-file dependencies and enabling contextual analysis for a given conflict. Using graph connectivity algorithms, Rover further clusters conflicting code and associated changes into meaningful "contexts" that guide the LLM in generating accurate resolutions. We compared Rover with standalone LLMs, machine learning baseline MergeGen, and suggestion provider tool WizardMerge with adjacent code as the contexts. Evaluation results show that Rover surpasses all of these approaches in terms of conflict resolution, achieving higher similarity to ground-truth resolutions at character, lexical, and semantic levels.

</details>


### [443] [ContractBench: Can LLM Agents Preserve Observation Contracts?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17281)
*Jicheng Wang,Yifeng He,Zili Wang,Hanwen Xing,Arkaprava De,Hao Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出ContractBench基准，评估LLM智能体在API交互中对观察合约（如预签名URL、会话令牌等）的合规性，发现即使最先进的模型也无法稳定保证生成工件的有效性和完整性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准评估通用工具使用能力，但忽略了工具增强型LLM智能体在调用API时产生的中间输出（观察合约）需要满足时间有效性和字节完整性约束，这种合规能力未被专门评估。

Method: 构建ContractBench基准，包含33个双轴任务，通过虚拟时钟控制时间、SHA-256哈希验证字节完整性，并基于真实API规范对失败标签进行分类。评估了38个模型。

Result: 最佳模型Claude-Opus-4.6仅达77.8%；Qwen 3.5系列在4B(0%)到9B(56.6%)间出现能力悬崖；GPT-5系列中出现非单调扩展，agentic后训练可能因谄媚回归降低合规性；失败分类可作为上下文奖励信号，在GPT-5.1上提升7.1个百分点。

Conclusion: 观察合约合规性是新兴且易退化的能力，即使前沿模型也无法保证，且该能力与通用工具使用能力正交，需要专门评估和优化。

Abstract: Tool-augmented LLM agents call APIs whose intermediate outputs, such as presigned URLs, session tokens, and OAuth state parameters, are observation contracts: artifacts whose later use is constrained by the external system that produced them. We show that observation contract compliance (preserving the temporal validity and byte-level integrity) is an emergent, regression-prone capability: it is neither guaranteed by general tool-use ability nor consistently improved by larger or newer models. To measure this, we introduce ContractBench, a benchmark of 33 dual-axis tasks that probe two orthogonal failure modes no existing benchmark evaluates: validity failures (using an artifact after expiry) and integrity failures (corrupting an artifact's bytes through the observation-to-action pipeline). Our evaluation is deterministic and programmatic, with a virtual clock controlling time and SHA-256 hashes verifying byte integrity. We assign each outcome a failure label drawn from real-world API specifications. We evaluate 38 models and report four findings: (i) no evaluated model clears 80%, with Claude-Opus-4.6 leading at 77.8%, revealing that current frontier models still fail to comply with observation contracts; (ii) a sharp within-family capability cliff in Qwen 3.5 between 4B (0%) and 9B (56.6%), smoothing to 70.7% at 397B-A17B: what emerges across the cliff is mid-trajectory restraint, not tool-call competence; (iii) non-monotonic scaling across the GPT-5 family: agentic post-training can erode compliance through sycophancy-driven regression; (iv) our failure taxonomy works as an actionable in-context reward signal, yielding +7.1 pp on 42 paired GPT-5.1 failures.

</details>


### [444] [Debug Like a Human: Scaling LLM-based Fault Localization to Processor Design via Block-Level Instruction-Oriented Slicing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17290)
*Zizhen Liu,Xiaoguang Mao,Deheng Yang,Jiayu He,Yihao Qin,Guangda Zhang,Yan Lei,Jianjun Xu,Jiang Wu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: BluesFL 是一个基于 LLM 的块级处理器设计故障定位框架，通过数据流代码块化与指令导向切片算法，在19K行RISC-V处理器上实现Top-1定位24个bug（提升242.9%），单bug平均成本仅$0.257。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM方法多聚焦于模块级硬件设计，难以直接应用于大规模、项目级处理器设计的自动故障定位，亟需一种能处理复杂处理器代码结构的块级定位方法。

Method: 1) 数据流驱动的代码块化方法，引导LLM聚焦关键局部上下文；2) 块级指令导向切片(Blues)算法，模拟工程师通过分析指令执行路径与处理器状态进行调试的推理过程。

Result: 在19K行SystemVerilog的真实RISC-V处理器上，Top-1正确定位24个bug，相较现有最优方法(7个)提升242.9%，单bug平均成本$0.257。

Conclusion: BluesFL在大规模处理器设计故障定位上显著优于现有方法，且成本经济高效，证明了块级LLM策略在实际处理器验证中的可行性与有效性。

Abstract: Fault localization in modern processor design code is a critical yet time-consuming step during processor verification. While recent advances in LLM-based techniques for module-level hardware design have shown promising results, automatically localizing bugs in large-scale, project-level processor designs remains challenging. In this paper, we present BluesFL, a novel block-level LLM-based fault localization framework for processor designs. Inspired by the way engineers debug processors, we first propose a dataflow-based code blockization approach to guide LLMs to focus on critical local code context. We further propose a Block-Level Instruction-Oriented Slicing (Blues) algorithm that enables LLMs to mimic human reasoning by analyzing instruction execution paths and processor states. We evaluate BluesFL on a real-world RISC-V processor core comprising 19K lines of SystemVerilog code. Experimental results demonstrate that BluesFL correctly localizes 24 bugs at Top-1, achieving 242.9% improvement over the existing state-of-the-art (7 bugs). Cost analysis shows that BluesFL requires an average of only $0.257 to localize a single bug.

</details>


### [445] [Towards an Ontology for the Foundations of Software Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17374)
*Ralf Lämmel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文介绍了软件语言基础（FSL）本体论的第一版，该本体系统整理了软件语言（包括编程语言、建模语言等）的基础概念、分类、工具和方法，并利用GenAI辅助本体工程，旨在作为计算机科学教育的知识资源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要系统化地组织软件语言（涵盖编程语言、建模语言等多种类型）的底层基础，在教育领域建立多个学科领域之间的原则性连接，以支持计算机科学教育。

Method: 采用相对标准的方法论，包括期望设定、重用、概念化、形式化和验证等步骤，并利用GenAI辅助本体工程中的发现、分类、链接、补全和转换环节。

Result: 发布了FSL第一版（V1），该本体系统地组织了软件语言的类别、概念、相关工具和方法、底层形式系统，并将其嵌入软件工程活动。

Conclusion: FSL本体作为计算机科学教育的知识资源，通过原则性方式连接多个学科领域，且GenAI可有效辅助本体工程的各项任务。

Abstract: The notion of software languages subsumes programming languages, modeling languages, and yet many other types of languages used in software engineering. The emerging ontology `Foundations of Software Languages' (FSL) organizes the foundations underlying software languages. We are concerned with language categories, language concepts, associated tools and methodological approaches, the formal systems or other formal entities underlying software languages, and the embedding of software languages into into software engineering activities. The primary objective of FSL is to serve as a knowledge resource in Computer Science education by connecting several subject areas in a principled manner. The first release of FSL (V1), as discussed in this paper, was built through a relatively standard methodology involving common steps for expectations, reuse, conceptualization, formalization, and validation. We leveraged GenAI to support ontology engineering (discovery, classification, linkage, completion, and transformation).

</details>


### [446] [NOETHER: A Constructive Framework for Metamorphic Pattern Discovery from Operator Algebras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17390)
*Meng Li,Xiaohua Yang,Jie Liu,Shiyu Yan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: NOETHER是一个两层框架，通过上游数学结构分解和下游代数闭包算法，将蜕变测试中的蜕变关系识别从归纳过程转变为可证明的演绎过程，在三个算子代数领域验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有蜕变测试方法面临三个基础问题：起源（MR从何而来）、闭包（MR集合是否完备）、可迁移性（MR能否跨系统复用）。现有归纳方法无法回答这些根本性问题。

Method: NOETHER采用两层架构：上游层将程序诱导的算子代数分解为8个数学结构块（对称性、序、自伴、时间反演、极限、定性动力学、方法比较、关系等价）；下游CONSTRUCT-MP算法机械地从代数中生成MetaPattern集合，并保证代数闭包（定理1）和多项式时间可判定性（定理2）。

Result: 在玻尔兹曼反应堆物理中系统化了先前的归纳目录；在等变机器学习中推导出旋转不变性、对偶性和训练轨迹可逆性的可执行MR；在关系查询优化器中验证了关系等价块。绝对完备性猜想（定理1'）在PWR堆芯扩散场景中被两个独立反例证伪，揭示了5个平移扩展维度。

Conclusion: 将归纳从每个程序的MR采样转移到每个领域的代数层面，下游步骤是演绎和机械的，从而回答了起源、闭包和可迁移性三个基础问题。

Abstract: Context. Metamorphic Testing is recognised in IEEE/ISO software-testing standards and increasingly recommended for AI systems, but its progress is bottlenecked by metamorphic relation (MR) identification: existing approaches (structured frameworks, mining and evolutionary pipelines, LLM-assisted methods, MetaPattern catalogues) share an inductive grounding that leaves three foundational questions open: origin, closure, and transferability.
  Objective. We propose a framework whose downstream step from program-induced operator algebra to MetaPattern set is mechanical and provable, while the upstream curation of the algebra is a stated empirical hypothesis with explicit scope precondition.
  Method. NOETHER is a two-layer framework. The upstream layer is an eight-block decomposition over recurrent mathematical structures (symmetry, order, self-adjoint, time-reversal, limit, qualitative-dynamics, method-comparison, relational equivalence). The downstream CONSTRUCT-MP algorithm produces a MetaPattern set with algebraic-closure (Theorem 1) and polynomial-time decidability (Theorem 2) guarantees. We test the framework on three operator-algebraic domains.
  Results. On Boltzmann reactor physics NOETHER systematises a prior inductive catalogue; on equivariant ML it derives executable MRs for rotation invariance, adjoint duality, and training-trajectory reversibility; on relational query optimisers it exercises the relational-equivalence block. The central falsifiable prediction (L*-blindness on homogeneity-preserving mutators) holds on the in-scope substrate. The absolute-completeness conjecture (Theorem 1') is falsified on PWR core diffusion via two pairwise-independent counterexamples that identify five Translate-extension dimensions.
  Conclusion. Induction is relocated from per-program MR sampling to a per-domain algebraic layer; the downstream step is deductive and mechanical.

</details>


### [447] [One Step Further: Understanding PLC Binaries Through Cross-Platform Reverse Engineering and Function-Level Semantic Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17392)
*Ang Jia,Yaxin Duan,He Jiang,Zhenzhou Tian,Zhilei Ren,Xiaochen Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出PLC-BinX，一种跨平台PLC二进制代码分析工作流，能够从四种PLC平台恢复函数级语义信息，并在工具链预测（100% F1）和功能预测（49.18% F1）两个下游任务上取得效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对PLC二进制分析面临三大挑战：异构二进制格式、控制逻辑与运行时代码混合导致的语义纠缠、以及缺乏可解释的语义表示用于下游分析，现有方法难以实现自动化跨平台分析。

Method: 提出PLC-BinX工作流，包含三个核心步骤：(1) 跨平台逆向工程，支持CODESYS v3、GEB、OpenPLC v2/v3四种平台；(2) 核心函数提取；(3) 函数级语义表示构建。基于恢复的语义表示，进行工具链预测和功能预测两个下游任务。

Result: 十折程序级评估中，工具链预测达到100%精确率、召回率和F1值；功能预测（22个标签）达到51.43%精确率、49.38%召回率、49.18% F1值。

Conclusion: PLC-BinX提供了一种有效且可解释的跨平台PLC二进制理解方法，能够从异构PLC二进制中提取任务相关的函数级语义信息。

Abstract: As emerging attacks increasingly target Industrial Control Systems (ICS), the security of Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs) has become a critical concern. Binary Code Analysis (BCA), which enables analysts to understand compiled programs without source code, is essential for ICS security tasks such as post-attack digital forensics and incident response. However, automated BCA for PLC binaries remains challenging due to three key issues: heterogeneous binary formats across PLC platforms, entangled program semantics caused by the mixture of control logic with runtime code, and limited semantic representations for interpretable and learning-based downstream analysis. In this paper, we present PLC-BinX, a BCA workflow for cross-platform PLC binary understanding. PLC-BinX analyzes PLC binaries from four platforms: CODESYS v3, GEB, OpenPLC v2, and OpenPLC v3, and recovers function-level information through cross-platform reverse engineering, core-function extraction, and function-level semantic representation construction. Based on the recovered semantic representations, we further study two downstream tasks: toolchain prediction and functionality prediction. Under ten-fold program-level evaluation, PLC-BinX achieves 100.00% precision, recall, and F1 in toolchain prediction, and 51.43% precision, 49.38% recall, and 49.18% F1 in functionality prediction over 22 labels. The results demonstrate that PLC-BinX provides an effective and interpretable approach to cross-platform PLC binary understanding by exposing task-relevant function-level semantics from heterogeneous PLC binaries.

</details>


### [448] [Benchmarking Mythos-Linked Bug Rediscovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17416)
*Isaac David,Arthur Gervais*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过54次受控实验发现，在已知目标文件的情况下，三个模型（GPT-5.5 xhigh、Claude Opus 4.7、Kimi K2）对Anthropic Mythos相关漏洞的定位成功率极低，总计仅有6次成功匹配，主要失败模式为过早承诺于文件内的候选方案而错过关键不变量的修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证Anthropic Mythos材料中声称的AI在真实漏洞发现上的能力，通过排除提示中关键标识信息（如CVE编号、补丁哈希等），测试模型在仅知目标文件情况下定位补丁所修复漏洞的能力。

Method: 设计受控目标文件重现实验：选取6个公开或高置信度的Mythos相关系统任务，每个模型获得相同目标文件、只读源码工具、每个任务3次重复，以及手动目标匹配规则；提示中删除所有关键标识信息。共3个模型×6个任务×3次重复=54次尝试。

Result: GPT-5.5 xhigh成功5/18次（覆盖2/6任务），含一个错误目标则覆盖3/6个核心漏洞；Claude Opus 4.7成功1/18次（覆盖1/6任务）；Kimi K2成功0/18次。主要失败模式为模型过早选定文件内似是而非的候选位置，而错过了公共Mythos补丁证据所修复的具体不变量。

Conclusion: 实验结果虽不否定Anthropic未公开的完整工作流程，但表明在有利的目标文件提示框架下，特定系统的漏洞定位提示仅在54次尝试中产生6次目标匹配，说明当前模型在缺乏关键上下文时定位真实漏洞的能力有限。

Abstract: Anthropic's April 2026 Mythos materials combine benchmark claims with concrete bug-finding stories across OpenBSD, FreeBSD, Linux, FFmpeg, and browsers. This paper reports a controlled target-file rediscovery experiment on six public or high-confidence Mythos-linked systems tasks. Each model receives the same target file or files, read-only source tools, three repeats per task, and one manual target-matching rubric; prompts omit CVE identifiers, patch hashes, advisory text, author names, disclosure dates, and answer key root cause language. The experiment contains 54 counted model-task attempts: three models, six tasks, and three repeats, giving 18 attempts per model. GPT-5.5 xhigh achieves 5/18 target rediscoveries, covering 2/6 tasks; counting one wrong-target mpegts.c finding separately gives 3/6 distinct core bugs. Claude Opus 4.7 achieves 1/18 target rediscoveries, covering 1/6 tasks. Kimi K2 records 0/18 target rediscoveries. The dominant failure mode is early commitment to plausible alternate candidates within the assigned file: models often submit source-grounded hypotheses while missing the specific invariant corrected by public Mythos patch evidence. These results do not refute Anthropic's undisclosed workflow, but show that under this favorable target-file scaffold, systems-specific prompting yields only six target matches across 54 counted attempts.

</details>


### [449] [A semantic mutation metric for metamorphic relation adequacy in scientific computing programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17437)
*Meng Li,Xiaohua Yang,Jie Liu,Shiyu Yan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出语义变异分数(SMS)，基于五个领域语义算子构建，在经典极限下退化为传统变异分数，实验显示中等效应量且LLM来源差异不显著，部分语义变异类在句法配置下不可达。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统变异分数基于句法AST变异，无法捕捉领域语义信息，导致科学计算中的测试预言问题未能被充分解决。

Method: 定义五个领域语义算子(守恒侵蚀、算子替换、超参数、轨迹翻转、结构注入)；采用12个被测程序×5个变质关系的设计，覆盖四个浮点输出类别；使用三层归因分类器区分真实语义故障与扰动；通过同源/跨源消融实验隔离LLM来源多样性贡献。

Result: 预注册的大效应阈值未达到(中等效应量)；相同提示下跨源池化未显著改变效应量；LLM生成与默认句法变异在AST级别重叠小；超参数、结构注入、轨迹翻转类在默认句法配置下不可达。

Conclusion: SMS是科学计算中领域语义变质关系集的后向兼容充分性度量；一阶不可达性证据与效应量问题相互独立。

Abstract: Context. Metamorphic Testing addresses the test-oracle problem in scientific computing, but classical Mutation Score operates on syntactic AST mutations and misses domain semantics.
  Objective. We propose the Semantic Mutation Score (SMS), built on five domain-semantic operators (Conservation Erosion, Operator Substitution, Hyperparameter, Trajectory Flip, Structural Injection). SMS degenerates almost everywhere to MS in a characterised limit, so any SMS-based conclusion remains consistent with prior mutation-testing literature in the classical regime.
  Method. A 12-PUT x 5-MP design over four single-output float-to-float classes (numeric, probabilistic, surrogate, machine-learning) is paired with a three-layer attribution classifier separating true semantic faults from tolerance, OOD, statistical, and artefact categories. A same-source / cross-source ablation under an identical prompt isolates the LLM-source-diversity contribution. LLM-generated mutants are compared against a default-configuration cosmic-ray syntactic pool at the AST-normalised level.
  Results. The pre-registered large-effect threshold for Cliff's delta is not met under the point-estimate criterion; the observed effect lies in the medium-effect range. Cross-source pooling under an identical prompt does not appreciably shift delta, indicating that LLM identity is not the lever within this design. AST-level overlap between LLM-generated and default cosmic-ray syntactic mutants is small; the Hyperparameter, Structural Injection, and Trajectory Flip classes are unreachable under default first-order syntactic configurations.
  Conclusion. SMS is a backward-compatible adequacy metric for domain-semantic metamorphic-relation sets in scientific computing. The first-order unreachability evidence is independent of the effect-size question.

</details>


### [450] [DiagEval: Trajectory-Conditioned Diagnosis for Reliable Software Evaluation with GUI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17439)
*Sirui Hong,Zhijie Liu,Tengfei Li,Wei Tao,Yifan Wu,Chenglin Wu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出DiagEval协议，通过轨迹条件诊断探针解决GUI评估中失败归因模糊的问题，在软件缺陷评估中显著提升准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GUI评估器在失败时无法区分是执行错误还是真正的软件缺陷，导致归因模糊，传统重试方法效率低下且不精准。

Method: DiagEval协议利用失败轨迹选择有目标的诊断探针，聚合结果为内部归因信号，不重构潜在状态图或校准后验概率。

Result: 在WebDevJudge-Unit和RealDevBench上，假阴性案例恢复45.6-62.1%的被误归因的失败，准确率分别从69.9%提升至78.3%，从65.0%提升至81.6%。

Conclusion: 可靠的GUI-agent评估不仅需要更强的执行能力，还需要主动的失败诊断来区分评估器错误与真实软件缺陷。

Abstract: Evaluating LLM-generated interactive software requires execution in addition to static analysis. The key difficulty is that correctness is a graph-level reachable property over latent UI state-transition graphs, whereas a GUI evaluator observes only a single execution trajectory. A failed rollout therefore rules out only one realized path, leaving failure attribution ambiguous between evaluator-side execution error and genuine software defect. We present DiagEval, a trajectory-conditioned diagnostic evaluation protocol for post-failure GUI-agent evaluation of interactive software. Rather than blindly retrying from scratch, DiagEval reuses the failed trajectory to choose targeted diagnostic probes and aggregates their outcomes into an internal attribution signal. The latent-graph view motivates the diagnostic problem; DiagEval does not reconstruct the graph or estimate calibrated posterior probabilities. We evaluate DiagEval on WebDevJudge-Unit and RealDevBench across multiple GUI-agent evaluators and LLM backbones. On false-negative cases, DiagEval recovers 45.6-62.1% of failures that were initially misattributed to software defects, outperforming retry-based baselines with 34.4-160.6% relative gains. On the full evaluation sets, this recovery improves accuracy from 69.9% to 78.3% on WebDevJudge-Unit and from 65.0% to 81.6% on RealDevBench. These results suggest that reliable GUI-agent evaluation requires not only stronger execution, but also active failure diagnosis to disambiguate evaluator-side errors from genuine software defects. Our code is available at https://github.com/scutGit/DiagEval.

</details>


### [451] [MemRepair: Hierarchical Memory for Agentic Repository-Level Vulnerability Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17444)
*Simiao Liu,Li Zhang,Fang Liu,Xiaoli Lian,Yang Liu,Yinghao Zhu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MemRepair提出了一种记忆增强的智能体框架，通过三种互补的记忆层（历史修复、安全模式、改进轨迹）和动态反馈循环，将漏洞修复转化为迭代的、经验驱动的过程，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动化漏洞修复系统缺乏持久化机制来复用先前的修复经验或从失败的验证尝试中学习，导致在多文件复杂修复任务中效果有限。

Method: 提出MemRepair框架，包含三个记忆层：History-Fix（仓库级修复惯例）、Security-Pattern（可复用安全防御模式）、Refinement-Trajectory（失败到成功的修复轨迹），并结合动态反馈驱动的精炼循环。

Result: 在SEC-Bench、PatchEval（Python, Go, JavaScript）和Multi-SWE-bench C++子集上分别达到58.0%、58.2%和30.58%的修复率，超越OpenHands、SWE-agent和InfCode-C++等工具。

Conclusion: 持久化、层次化的修复记忆能够显著提升智能体漏洞修复在不同语言和仓库环境下的可靠性。

Abstract: Modern software ecosystems face a rapidly growing number of disclosed vulnerabilities, increasing the need for automated repair techniques that can operate reliably at repository scale. Although Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents have recently shown promise for automated vulnerability repair (AVR), most existing systems still treat repair as a single generation step over the currently visible code context. As a result, they lack a persistent mechanism for reusing prior fixes or learning from failed validation attempts, which limits their effectiveness on complex, multi-file repair tasks. We present MemRepair, a memory-augmented agentic framework that formulates vulnerability repair as an iterative, experience-driven process. MemRepair combines three complementary memory layers, i.e., History-Fix, Security-Pattern, and Refinement-Trajectory memories, with a dynamic feedback-driven refinement loop. This design allows the agent to retrieve repository-specific repair conventions, apply reusable security defenses, and exploit prior "failure-to-success" trajectories to revise semantically invalid patches based on runtime evidence. We evaluate MemRepair on three representative repository-level vulnerability repair benchmarks: SEC-Bench, PatchEval (Python, Go, JavaScript), and the C++ subset of Multi-SWE-bench. MemRepair achieves state-of-the-art resolution rates of 58.0%, 58.2%, and 30.58%, respectively, outperforming strong general-purpose agents such as OpenHands and SWE-agent, as well as the specialized AVR tool InfCode-C++, while maintaining competitive repair cost. These results show that persistent, hierarchical repair memory can substantially improve the reliability of agentic vulnerability repair across diverse languages and repository settings.

</details>


### [452] [ContraFix: Agentic Vulnerability Repair via Differential Runtime Evidence and Skill Reuse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17450)
*Simiao Liu,Fang Liu,Li Zhang,Yang Liu,Yinghao Zhu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ContraFix是一个基于Agent的自动漏洞修复框架，通过差分运行时证据和可复用修复技能，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，成本仅为最强基线的三分之一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM Agent在自动漏洞修复中主要失败于语义误解——倾向于生成面向症状的补丁而非因果修复。原因有二：一是仅从失败执行出发，无法区分故障点附近的因果变量；二是修复经验无法跨仓库复用。

Method: ContraFix包含三个核心组件：Mutator构造跨越失败边界的PoC变体；Analyzer在故障区域插入状态探针，总结崩溃与非崩溃执行的差异，生成修复规范；Patcher将规范转化为经过验证的源码补丁。每次成功修复更新双轨技能库（修复规范+变异策略），通过三级策略检索。

Result: 在SEC-Bench（C/C++，200实例）上达到84.0%，在PatchEval（Go/Python/JS，225实例）上达到73.8%，均实现SOTA性能，成本仅为最强可比基线的不到三分之一。

Conclusion: 通过差分运行时证据驱动修复规范生成，并结合可复用的修复技能库，可以有效提升LLM Agent在真实漏洞修复中的因果推理能力，同时显著降低修复成本。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly used for automated vulnerability repair (AVR), where repository-level reasoning enables them to inspect context and produce source-code patches. However, recent empirical results show that these agents still struggle with real-world vulnerabilities. Their main failure mode is semantic misunderstanding: choosing a repair direction that does not match the root cause. We identify two reasons for this gap. Existing agents usually reason from the failing execution alone. A crash report can pinpoint where the program failed, but it does not reveal which variable or state transition, among many candidates near the fault site, separates the crashing behavior from safe execution. As a result, agents often produce symptom-oriented patches instead of causal fixes. Moreover, evidence collected for one vulnerability is rarely retained, so similar cases in later repositories must be diagnosed again from scratch. We present ContraFix, an agentic AVR framework that couples differential runtime evidence with reusable repair skills. Its Mutator constructs PoC variants that straddle the failure boundary; its Analyzer inserts state probes around the fault region and summarizes divergences between crashing and non-crashing executions into a repair specification; and its Patcher converts the specification into verified source patches. Each successful repair updates a two-track skill base containing repair specifications and mutation strategies, which are retrieved through a three-tier policy for future instances. On SEC-Bench (C/C++, 200 instances) and PatchEval (Go, Python, JavaScript, 225 instances), ContraFix with GPT-5-mini resolves 84.0% and 73.8% of the tasks, respectively, achieving state-of-the-art performance on both benchmarks while costing less than one-third of the strongest comparable baseline.

</details>


### [453] [Event-B Agent: Towards LLM Agent for Formal Model Synthesis and Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17475)
*Hongshu Wang,Xinyue Zuo,Yuhan Sun,Qin Li,Yamine Ait Ameur,Jin Song Dong*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出Event-B Agent框架，利用LLM将自然语言需求自动转化为形式化模型，并通过迭代的模型修复与精化过程实现"正确性由构造保证"。实验表明，该框架在端到端形式化模型合成与修复任务上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 形式化方法能保证软件正确性，但学习曲线陡峭、需要数学专业知识，导致难以普及。现有LLM方法局限于孤立任务（如定理证明或模型合成），缺乏一个将模型与证明协同演化的综合框架，无法反映真实开发实践。

Method: 提出Event-B Agent框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 精化（Refinement）——逐步简化证明义务；2) 修复（Repair）——确保每个精化步骤的正确性。两者相互强化，通过形式化验证反馈不断迭代提升模型质量。

Result: 在多个不同复杂度的系统上，Event-B Agent在端到端形式化模型合成与修复任务中大幅超越基线方法，同时保持了合理的效率。

Conclusion: Event-B Agent朝着"正确性由构造保证"的形式化模型合成与修复迈出了有前景的一步。

Abstract: Building software that is correct by construction is a long-standing goal in software engineering, as it ensures reliability during design and development rather than after deployment. Formal methods realize this vision by enabling the expression of system behavior and requirements in mathematics, thereby guaranteeing correctness through formal verification, including theorem proving and model checking. However, the steep learning curve and demand for mathematical expertise hinder the widespread adoption of formal methods. Large language models (LLMs) have recently shown promise in bridging this gap through autoformalization. However, existing LLM-based approaches are largely limited to isolated tasks, such as theorem proving without formalization or model synthesis with insufficient verification. While valuable, these efforts do not fully exploit the potential of a more comprehensive framework in which models and proofs evolve together, a process that closely reflects real-world development practice. To address this gap, we propose Event-B Agent, a novel framework inspired by the interleaved nature of software design. Given natural language requirements, Event-B Agent constructs an initial model and iteratively repairs and refines it using formal verification feedback. Refinement simplifies proof discharge, while repair of models and proofs ensures the soundness of each refinement step. Together, these two components reinforce each other to progressively improve the model quality. Evaluation across systems of varying complexity demonstrates that Event-B Agent substantially outperforms baselines in end-to-end formal model synthesis and repair, while maintaining reasonable efficiency. These results suggest that Event-B Agent is a promising step toward correct-by-construction formal model synthesis and repair.

</details>


### [454] [SaaSBench: Exploring the Boundaries of Coding Agents in Long-Horizon Enterprise SaaS Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17526)
*Qingnan Ren,Shun Zou,Shiting Huang,Ziao Zhang,Kou Shi,Zhen Fang,Yiming Zhao,Yu Zeng,Qisheng Su,Lin Chen,Yong Wang,Zehui Chen,Xiangxiang Chu,Feng Zhao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SaaSBench 是首个针对企业级 SaaS 系统的 AI 智能体基准测试，涵盖 30 个复杂任务、6 个领域、8 种编程语言等，发现当前智能体的主要瓶颈不在代码生成，而在于系统配置与集成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试局限于简化、单栈应用，无法反映真实企业 SaaS 系统的异构环境、全栈编排和系统级复杂性，缺乏对智能体在现实工程约束下的评估。

Method: 构建 SaaSBench 基准，包含 30 个跨 6 个 SaaS 领域的复杂任务、5,370 个验证节点，涉及 8 种编程语言、6 种数据库和 13 种框架，并设计了依赖感知的混合评估范式。

Result: 超过 95% 的任务失败发生在智能体触及深层业务逻辑之前，主要卡在系统配置与集成环节；模型常因过度自信而过早停止，或陷入无效调试循环。

Conclusion: 当前最先进智能体的核心瓶颈并非生成孤立代码逻辑，而是成功配置和集成多组件系统，SaaSBench 可作为推动可靠、系统级编码智能体发展的挑战性测试平台。

Abstract: As autonomous coding agents become capable of handling increasingly long-horizon tasks, they have gradually demonstrated the potential to complete end-to-end software development. Although existing benchmarks have recently evolved from localized code editing to from-scratch project generation, they remain confined to structurally simplified, single-stack applications. Consequently, they fail to capture the heterogeneous environments, full-stack orchestration, and system-level complexity of real enterprise Software as a Service (SaaS) systems, leaving a critical gap in assessing agents under realistic engineering constraints. To fill this gap, we introduce SaaSBench, the first benchmark designed to explore the boundaries of AI agents in enterprise SaaS engineering. Spanning 30 complex tasks across 6 SaaS domains with 5,370 validation nodes, it incorporates 8 programming languages, 6 databases, and 13 frameworks to meticulously mirror real-world software heterogeneity. Furthermore, we design a dependency-aware hybrid evaluation paradigm tailored for complex systems with long horizons and multi-component coupling, enabling fine-grained, reproducible assessment. Crucially, our extensive experiments reveal a striking insight: the primary bottleneck for state-of-the-art agents is not generating isolated code logic, but successfully configuring and integrating a multi-component system. Over 95\% of task failures occur before agents even reach deep business logic, with models often falling victim to overconfidence and prematurely halting during foundational system setup, or getting trapped in ineffective debugging loops. We hope SaaSBench serves as a practical and challenging testbed to drive the evolution of reliable, system-level coding agents. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/ShadeCloak/SaaSbench}.

</details>


### [455] [AgentModernize: Preserving Business Logic in Legacy Modernization with Multi-Agent LLMs and Behavioral Specification Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17535)
*Sheikh Nazib Ahmed,Marnim Galib*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了一个多智能体框架AgentModernize，将遗留系统现代化问题转化为行为保留问题，通过行为规范图(BSG)确保业务逻辑在代码生成前被显式捕获和验证。实验表明，该框架在所有骨干模型上均取得非零的BER，而传统方法均为0%。BSG能捕获91.2%的黄金标准规则，证明瓶颈在于代码生成而非提取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具和基于LLM的方法将遗留系统现代化视为语法翻译任务，忽略了隐式规则、边界情况处理和跨模块约束，导致业务逻辑在现代化过程中丢失。

Method: 提出多智能体框架AgentModernize，包含四个专门智能体（提取、规范、生成、验证），核心中间产物为行为规范图(BSG)，强制在生成代码之前将业务逻辑显式化并可检查。

Result: 完整AgentModernize（含反馈）是所有配置中唯一在所有骨干模型下均获得非零平均BER的方法：GPT-4o-mini为9.4%，GPT-4o为8.1%，GPT-5.3-codex为19.4%。而SP-LLM和CoT-LLM在所有场景和骨干模型上均为0%。BSG捕获率高达91.2%。

Conclusion: 遗留系统现代化的核心瓶颈在于代码生成阶段而非逻辑提取阶段；将现代化问题重新定义为行为保持问题是有效的；行为规范图(BSG)是关键的设计选择。

Abstract: Legacy modernization breaks business logic. Most tools and LLM-based approaches treat modernization as syntax translation, losing implicit rules, edge-case handling, and cross-module constraints. We present AgentModernize, a multi-agent framework that treats modernization as a behavioral preservation problem. Four specialized agents handle extraction, specification, code generation, and validation. The key intermediate artifact -- a Behavioral Specification Graph (BSG) -- forces extracted business logic to be explicit and inspectable before any code is generated. We evaluated on LegacyModernize-8, eight scenarios spanning telecom and banking, using three models (GPT-4o-mini, GPT-4o, GPT-5.3-codex) under a fair protocol: same gold-standard tests, 3 trials, temperature 0.0. Full AgentModernize with feedback was the only configuration with non-zero mean BER under every backbone. SP-LLM and CoT-LLM scored 0.0% on every scenario, on every backbone. AgentModernize without feedback scored 0.0% mean BER with GPT-4o-mini and GPT-5.3-codex; under GPT-4o it achieved non-zero BER only on S1 (44.4%; 5.6% mean over scenarios). Mean BER for full AgentModernize was 9.4% (mini), 8.1% (GPT-4o), and 19.4% (codex). The BSG captures 91.2% of gold-standard rules, confirming that the bottleneck is code generation, not extraction.

</details>


### [456] [Rethinking Code Review in the Age of AI: A Vision for Agentic Code Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17548)
*Hüseyin Özgür Kamalı,Erdem Tuna,Vahid Haratian,Eray Tüzün*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文回顾了代码审查从非正式同行评审到PR工作流的演变，分析了AI代码助手带来的挑战（代码产出增加但审查瓶颈加剧），并提出一个由AI智能体与人工质量控制门控相结合的五阶段代码审查框架，同时指出了负责任采用所面临的关键挑战和研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI编码助手加速了代码产出，但代码审查成为瓶颈；现有AI支持碎片化，仅关注推荐、描述生成等孤立任务，缺乏端到端的PR审查流程支持。

Method: 提出五阶段AI驱动代码审查框架：PR创建、PR增强、审阅者选择、AI辅助代码审查、PR回溯。在每个阶段保留人工关键决策点，结合专用AI智能体与人工控制门控。

Result: 设计了一个端到端的AI辅助代码审查工作流框架，明确了人机协作的关键节点，并识别出可靠性、偏见、隐私、自动化偏差、透明度和评估六大开放挑战。

Conclusion: 代码审查需要从碎片化AI支持转向集成化、人机协作的智能工作流，未来研究应聚焦于负责任的AI采用和有效的人机协作机制。

Abstract: Code review has evolved for decades, from informal peer checking to today's pull request (PR) workflows, yet it remains a largely manual, uneven, and cognitively demanding process. The rise of Artificial Intelligence (AI) coding assistants has intensified this challenge: while these tools increase code production velocity, they also expand the volume of code requiring review, turning code review into a growing bottleneck. Current AI support remains fragmented, with tools focusing on isolated tasks such as reviewer recommendation, PR description generation, or comment suggestion rather than the end-to-end PR review workflow. In this paper, we review the historical evolution of code review practices and examine the shift driven by large language models (LLMs) and agentic AI systems. We then present a vision for an AI-powered code review workflow combining specialized agents with human-controlled quality gates. Our framework spans five stages: PR Creation, PR Augmentation, Reviewer Selection, AI-Assisted Code Review, and PR Retrospective, with humans retained at key decision points to preserve judgment, accountability, and team-level understanding. We identify major open challenges for responsible adoption, including reliability, bias, privacy, automation bias, transparency, and evaluation, and offer a research agenda for more effective human-AI collaboration in software engineering.

</details>


### [457] [Firefly: Illuminating Large-Scale Verified Tool-Call Data Generation from Real APIs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17558)
*Yuxuan Lu,Ziyi Wang,Yingzhou Lu,Yisi Sang,Jiri Gesi,Xianfeng Tang,Yimeng Zhang,Zhenwei Dai,Hui Liu,Hanqing Lu,Chen Luo,Qi He,Benoit Dumoulin,Jing Huang,Dakuo Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: FireFly通过逆向合成流程，利用真实MCP服务器和API探索结果生成可验证的工具调用训练数据，再用GRPO训练小模型达到强模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具调用智能体训练面临两难：合成环境偏离真实API行为，或生成任务缺乏可验证的ground-truth结果。需要一种能从真实API生成可验证训练数据的方案。

Method: 三步管道：(1) 用强LLM按图引导的DAG结构探索真实MCP API；(2) 从观察到的结果反向合成任务，保证标签可验证；(3) 构建检索增强模拟器缓存探索结果，支持离线可重复的RL训练。关键创新是将标准合成流程逆向——先探索再合成任务。

Result: 生成5,144个可验证任务，覆盖240个服务器和993个工具。4B参数的GRPO模型在工具调用基准上与Claude Sonnet 4.6持平，并在Tau2-Bench、MCPMark、MCP-Atlas上均有提升。

Conclusion: FireFly证明从真实API逆向合成数据是高效训练工具调用智能体的可行路径，小模型也能通过高质量验证数据达到大模型水平。

Abstract: Training tool-calling agents requires large-scale trajectory data with verifiable labels, yet existing approaches either synthesize environments that diverge from real API behavior or generate tasks without ground-truth outcomes for verification. We present FireFly, a pipeline for generating verified tool-call data from real-world MCP servers. Our key insight is to invert the standard synthesis pipeline: rather than generating tasks and hoping they are solvable, we first let a strong LLM explore real APIs along graph-guided DAG structures, then synthesize tasks backward from observed outcomes, guaranteeing label correctness by construction. To handle the scale of real-world tool spaces (${\sim}$1,000 tools), we build a pairwise tool graph and sample sub-DAGs to focus exploration on semantically coherent workflows. To address environment drift in live APIs, we construct a retrieval-augmented simulator that caches all exploration results and replays them during training and evaluation, enabling fully offline and reproducible RL. Applying this pipeline yields 5,144 verified tasks spanning 240 servers and 993 tools. A 4B-parameter model trained with GRPO on FireFly matches Claude Sonnet 4.6 on our held-out test set and shows improvements on multiple tool-calling benchmarks including Tau2-Bench, MCPMark, and MCP-Atlas.

</details>


### [458] [Automated Root-Cause Subclassification and No-Code Fix Generation for Invalid Bug Reports](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17561)
*Mahmut Furkan Gon,Emre Dinc,Tevfik Emre Sungur,Eray Tuzun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出针对无效bug报告的根因导向子分类标准化体系，并实验对比了普通LLM、检索增强生成（RAG）和智能体网络搜索在子分类与无代码修复生成上的表现。RAG在子分类上F1达0.66最高，智能体搜索在修复生成上Judge LLM成功率68.9%最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大量bug报告实际上无效（无需代码修改），手动判断根因并提供解决方案耗费大量客服资源，亟需自动化的子分类与修复生成方法。

Method: 建立根因导向的无效bug报告子分类标准，人工构建标注基准；分别使用普通LLM、RAG、智能体网络搜索三种方法进行子分类检测和无代码修复生成，并用加权F1、BERTScore和Judge LLM成功率评估。

Result: 子分类方面，RAG加权F1为0.66，略优于普通LLM（0.65）和智能体搜索（0.64）；"不可复现"类F1达0.85最优，"版本错误"类最难（F1 0.00-0.29）。修复生成方面，智能体搜索Judge LLM成功率68.9%最高，高于RAG（64.4%）和普通LLM（64.9%）。

Conclusion: RAG在子分类任务上表现最佳，智能体搜索在生成无代码修复方面更优；不同子类难度差异显著，"版本错误"是最具挑战的子类。

Abstract: Issues faced when using software are reported in the form of bug reports. However, many bug reports are invalid, meaning they do not require code changes, and are resolved with a no-code fix. Manually determining the root cause of the invalid bug reports and providing actionable resolutions by the customer support causes a serious waste of resources. Our goal is to introduce a standardized taxonomy for root-cause oriented invalid bug report subclassification, and perform experiments to test the accuracy of various approaches on invalid subclassification and no-code fix generation. We study how different configurations perform on a gold-standard benchmark we have created. Using a manually curated benchmark for higher quality analysis, we experimented with vanilla LLMs, Retrieval Augmented Generation, and agentic web search to identify invalid subclasses and generate no-code fixes. We evaluated the results against manually labeled ground truth data that includes the invalid subclass and no-code fixes from the original bug reports. We measured subclass detection performance with weighted F1-Score, and assessed no-code fix suggestions using BERTScore and Judge LLM success rates. For subclassification, retrieval augmented generation achieves the highest overall performance with 0.66 weighted F1, slightly outperforming vanilla LLMs at 0.65 and agentic web search at 0.64. At the subclass level, performance peaks at 0.85 F1 for Non-reproducibility and 0.79 for Feature Request and Question, while Wrong Version remains the most challenging with scores between 0.00 and 0.29. For no-code fix generation, agentic web search achieves the highest overall Judge LLM success rate at 68.9%, compared to 64.4% for RAG applications and 64.9% for vanilla LLMs, with subclass-level peaks of 87.4% for Working as Designed and 72.2% for Question.

</details>


### [459] [A Feature-Driven Framework for Software Fault Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17611)
*Ahmad Nauman Ghazi,Nagajyothi Devarapalli,Ashir Javeed,Sadi Alawadi,Fahed Alkhabbas,Khalid AlKharabsheh*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了特征选择与参数调优对软件故障预测中机器学习模型性能的联合影响。实验发现，CFS结合遗传算法优化的随机森林模型达到88.40%准确率，比基线提升18%，并识别出WMC和CBO等关键特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件故障预测对提升软件质量、降低维护成本至关重要，但现有研究较少同时考虑特征选择与超参数调优之间的交互作用对模型性能的影响。

Method: 采用四种特征选择方法（CFS、RFE、MI、L1正则化）与三种超参数调优技术（网格搜索、随机搜索、遗传算法），对随机森林、逻辑回归、支持向量机三种模型进行组合实验评估。

Result: CFS与遗传算法组合在随机森林上取得最高准确率88.40%，较基线提升18%；交叉验证变异仅为±1.0%；特征选择有效降低了维度并识别出WMC和CBO等关键指标。

Conclusion: 特征选择与参数调优的协同应用可显著提升SFP性能，且该方法具有鲁棒性和高效性，对实际工程中的故障预测有重要指导意义。

Abstract: Software fault prediction (SFP) is a critical task in software engineering, enabling early identification of faults in modules to improve software quality and reduce maintenance costs. This research investigates the combined effects of feature selection and parameter tuning on the performance of machine learning (ML) models for SFP. This study evaluates the interaction between feature selection methods, including correlation-based feature selection (CFS), recursive feature elimination (RFE), mutual information (MI), and L1 regularization, where hyperparameter tuning techniques such as grid search, randomized search, and genetic algorithm (GA) are used for optimization of ML algorithms, including random forest (RF), logistic regression (LR), and support vector machines (SVM) for optimized fault prediction performance. The combined application of CFS and GA yielded the highest accuracy, achieving 88.40% with RF, representing an improvement of 18% over baseline models without feature selection or tuning. Feature selection reduced dimensionality and identified critical attributes such as weighted methods per Class (WMC) and coupling between objects (CBO), while iterative parameter tuning optimized model alignment to these feature sets. Notably, the proposed methods demonstrated robustness, with minimal cross-validation variability (+-1.0%), and efficiency, reducing training times in univariate methods such as L1 regularization.

</details>


### [460] [Bridging the Gap on AI-Assisted Scientific Software Development Through Transparency and Traceability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17675)
*Chaitanya Bhave,Pierre-Clément A. Simon,Casey Icenhour,Lin Yang,Cody J. Permann,Daniel Schwen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文针对科研软件中AI辅助开发缺乏规范的问题，以聚变氚迁移代码TMAP8为平台，提出了在严格软件质量保证（SQA/NQA-1）框架下负责任地治理AI辅助代码开发的指导方针，通过验证与确认（V&V）用例开发作为治理试验田，确保可追溯性、独立验证和人工问责。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI辅助开发已在科研软件中普遍使用但缺乏正式认可与指导，尤其在安全关键的建模与模拟工具中，这种无监管的随意使用对软件质量构成系统性风险，因此需要建立负责任的治理框架。

Method: 以TMAP8（开源聚变氚迁移代码）为演示平台，提出结构化框架用于AI辅助的验证与确认（V&V）用例开发。该方法基于实践经验，在NQA-1要求下运作，强调人工问责、信息披露和审查标准。

Result: 提出了可操作的AI辅助代码开发指导方针，确立了在严格SQA/NQA-1标准下的信息披露和审查规范，并证明V&V用例开发（验证解已知、正确性可客观测量、错误可识别、工单可审计）是建立治理的理想试验场。

Conclusion: 科研软件社区面临的问题不是是否允许AI辅助开发，而是如何负责任地进行治理。本文提出的框架在保持人工问责的同时，为AI辅助科研软件开发建立了必要的规范标准。

Abstract: The widespread adoption of AI-assisted development in scientific software is not a future concern -- it is a present reality. Researchers are already using large language models to write code, generate test cases, and draft documentation, yet this practice remains largely unacknowledged and unguided in formal workflows and published work. This ad hoc, ungoverned use of AI represents a systemic risk to scientific software quality, particularly in safety-relevant modeling and simulation tools subject to strict Software Quality Assurance (SQA), or even Nuclear Quality Assurance Level 1 (NQA-1) standards, for which traceability, independent verification, and documented procedures are paramount. The question facing the scientific software community is, therefore, not whether to permit AI-assisted development, but how to govern it responsibly. This paper proposes guidance for AI-assisted code development in the context of strict software quality assurance. Using TMAP8 -- an open-source tritium migration code for fusion energy -- as a demonstration platform, we propose a structured framework for AI-assisted verification and validation (V&V) case development. V&V case development represents the ideal proving ground for establishing that governance: because validation cases have known solutions, correctness is objectively measurable, errors are identifiable by design, and the artifacts are fully auditable. The proposed guidance, developed based on practical experience described herein, operates within NQA-1 requirements, preserves human accountability, and establishes the disclosure and review standards that responsible AI-assisted scientific software development demands.

</details>


### [461] [LLM-Based Static Verification of Code Against Natural-Language Requirements: An Industrial Experience Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17926)
*Zhi Quan Zhou,Dave Towey,Tsong Yueh Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两阶段LLM工作流，通过AI规则提取器从自然语言需求中提取可验证规则，再用AI代码审计器检查实现代码，从而实现无需编译执行的静态需求合规验证，用于智能网联汽车网络安全案例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM主要用于生成需求/代码/测试，但缺乏对"代码是否满足自然语言需求"的静态验证能力。传统静态分析无法理解业务逻辑，测试又依赖执行环境和测试设计，亟需一种左移且需求感知的验证方法。

Method: 两阶段LLM工作流：阶段1，AI规则提取器从自然语言需求中提取可验证规则，并识别歧义、自相矛盾等不可验证语句；阶段2，AI代码审计器根据提取的规则检查实现代码。引入结构化中间表示缓解幻觉、输出变异和上下文丢失等问题。

Result: 该方法是一种需求感知和语义感知的静态分析形式，可补充软件测试。无需编译、执行或运行时环境，将验证左移至开发早期，并提供了解决测试预言问题的新途径。

Conclusion: LLM驱动的静态分析能有效弥合自然语言需求与代码验证之间的鸿沟，通过结构化中间表示降低LLM的不可靠性，为需求合规验证提供了可落地的左移方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate requirements specifications, design documents, code, and test cases. In contrast, much less attention has been given to a more difficult assurance problem: statically verifying whether implemented code satisfies requirements written in natural language. Conventional static analysis tools are effective at detecting coding defects and known vulnerability patterns, but they cannot determine whether program behavior matches intended business logic. Detecting such defects requires reasoning over the specification rather than the code alone. Software testing can expose some of these mismatches, but its effectiveness depends heavily on test design, executable artifacts, and runtime environments. This article presents a two-stage LLM-based workflow for addressing this challenge in an intelligent-vehicle cybersecurity case study. In the first stage, an AI-based rule miner extracts verifiable rules from natural-language requirements while explicitly identifying ambiguity, self-contradiction, and other non-verifiable statements. In the second stage, an AI-based code auditor checks implementation evidence against the extracted rules. Instead of asking a single LLM to directly verify code against lengthy natural-language specifications, the workflow introduces a structured intermediate representation to reduce hallucination, output variability, limited explainability, and context loss. The resulting approach is a requirement-aware and semantics-aware form of static analysis that complements software testing. By analyzing requirements and source code without requiring compilation, execution, or runtime environments, the method shifts verification and validation activities left in the development lifecycle. This LLM-based static analysis is also a new approach to addressing the test oracle problem.

</details>


### [462] [Contextualized Code Pretraining for Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17957)
*Chen Liu,Qingyuan Liang,Hanwen Zhang,Zeyu Sun,Yakun Zhang,Lu Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出上下文感知的代码预训练框架，通过静态分析提取调用者-被调用者关系，训练CallerGen模型并在CallerEval基准上评估，结果显示调用上下文对实际代码生成至关重要，小模型超越基线且与更大模型竞争。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码模型主要在自然语言描述的代码上训练，但在真实项目中，开发者常在有限的项目构件下实现缺失函数，而调用上下文（surrounding code）已经可用。现有模型未被显式优化来可靠利用调用上下文，导致实现与仓库中的使用场景整合不佳。

Method: 提出上下文感知的代码预训练框架，利用静态分析从真实仓库中自动提取大规模调用者-被调用者对，构建预训练任务和基准（CallerEval），训练CallerGen模型（多种规模），以调用上下文为条件进行代码生成。

Result: CallerGen在CallerEval基准上，220M模型达到16.58% pass@1，0.5B模型达到22.81% pass@1，超越同规模基线模型，并能与更大规模模型竞争。

Conclusion: 调用上下文在真实代码生成中具有重要意义，通过上下文感知预训练可以显著提升代码模型在仓库级场景下的生成质量。

Abstract: As code generation becomes increasingly central to improving software development efficiency, modern code models are largely trained and evaluated on code with natural-language descriptions. In real projects, developers often implement missing functions under limited project-specific artifacts, while the local call-site context is already available in the surrounding code. This usage context provides actionable cues about expected behavior, but existing models are not explicitly optimized to leverage it reliably, leading to implementations that may not integrate smoothly with surrounding usage in repository settings.
  In this work, we propose contextualized code pretraining, an invocation-aware framework that integrates calling context into both the training and evaluation of code models. Using static analysis, we automatically extract large-scale caller-callee pairs from real repositories to construct pretraining tasks and benchmarks that condition generation on the calling context. We train CallerGen, the first code models pretrained with invocation-aware objectives spanning multiple sizes, and evaluate them on CallerEval, a new benchmark featuring realistic scenarios. Experiments show that CallerGen outperforms comparable-scale models and remains competitive with larger ones across two benchmarks. Our 220M and 0.5B models achieve 16.58% and 22.81@% pass1, surpassing baselines on CallerEval. These results highlight the importance of calling context in realistic code generation.

</details>


### [463] [BLAgent: Agentic RAG for File-Level Bug Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17965)
*Md Afif Al Mamun,Gias Uddin*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: BLAgent是一个基于智能体RAG的代码库级缺陷定位框架，通过结构感知的代码编码、双视角查询变换和两阶段智能体重排序，在SWE-bench Lite上达到78%+（开源模型）和86%+（闭源模型）的Top-1准确率，同时比最强基线便宜18倍以上，并能提升自动程序修复成功率20%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缺陷定位是软件维护（如根因分析、自动程序修复）的关键瓶颈，现有RAG流水线依赖静态检索，缺乏识别错误代码所需的推理能力，且层级流水线中的错误会向下游传播，亟需更精确的定位方法。

Method: 提出BLAgent框架，包含三个核心设计：(i) 基于路径增强AST分块的结构感知仓库编码；(ii) 双视角查询变换，同时捕捉结构信号和行为信号；(iii) 两阶段智能体重排序，结合符号检查与基于证据的推理。在紧凑候选集上执行有界推理，平衡准确率和成本。

Result: 在SWE-bench Lite上，开源模型达78%+ Top-1准确率，闭源模型达86%+；成本比使用同模型的最强基线低18倍以上；集成到APR框架后，端到端修复成功率提升20%以上。

Conclusion: BLAgent通过智能体化RAG框架有效提升了文件级缺陷定位的准确性和经济性，验证了有界推理在代码定位任务中的有效性，并能显著改善下游自动程序修复的整体效果。

Abstract: Bug localization remains a key bottleneck in downstream software maintenance tasks, including root cause analysis, triage, and automated program repair (APR), despite recent advances in large language model (LLM)-based repair systems. File-level bug localization is especially critical in hierarchical pipelines, where errors can propagate to downstream stages such as statement-level localization or patch generation. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a promising direction for grounding LLMs in repository context, existing RAG pipelines rely on static retrieval and lack the reasoning needed to identify faulty code accurately. In this work, we present BLAgent, a novel agentic RAG framework for file-level bug localization that integrates three key ideas: (i) code structure-aware repository encoding with path-augmented AST-based chunking, (ii) dual-perspective query transformation capturing both structural and behavioral signals, and (iii) two-phase agentic reranking combining symbolic inspection with evidence-grounded reasoning. Unlike prior graph-based or multi-hop agentic approaches, BLAgent performs bounded reasoning over a compact candidate set, balancing accuracy and cost. On SWE-bench Lite, BLAgent attains over 78% Top-1 accuracy with open-source models and over 86% with a closed-source model, while being over 18x cheaper than the strongest baseline using the same model. When integrated into an APR framework, it improves end-to-end repair success by over 20%.

</details>


### [464] [Verify-Gated Completion as Admission Control in a Governed Multi-Agent Runtime: A Bounded Architecture Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17998)
*Hai-Duong Nguyen,The-Xuan Tran*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究验证门控完成模式（verify-gated completion）作为多智能体运行时系统的准入控制模式，通过只读验证器决定完成声明的接受与否，并采用数据包化状态和事件跟踪来保持可审计性。基于一个有限参考实现的实验显示：调用事件验证成功率为99.5%，但任务级验证覆盖率无法计算，且大部分数据来自单一高容量报告集群。证据仅支持一个狭窄结论：在观察条件下，只读验证门控加数据包化准入记录能使完成决策可检查且故障关闭。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统从短时交互演变为具有专门角色和持久状态的工具使用工作流，完成问题从纯生成问题变为运行时控制问题。需要一种能够审计、可检查且故障关闭的完成控制模式。

Method: 提出验证门控完成（verify-gated completion）作为治理型多智能体运行时的准入控制模式：智能体可以提议完成，但由只读验证器决定声明是否被接受。采用数据包化状态和事件跟踪保持审计路径，模糊或弱证据情况故障关闭。

Result: 已知结果调用事件验证成功率1,791/1,800=99.5%；影子策略/治理验证器评估显示规则一致性98.58%，安全预测中假成功率为0，阻止精度0.39%。但任务级验证覆盖率不可计算，1,762/1,801行来自单一高容量集群，仅17个事件为生产分类。

Conclusion: 在观察条件下，只读验证门控加数据包化准入记录能使完成决策可检查且故障关闭。关于部署运行、安全保障、结果提升、任务级覆盖、恢复有效性或外部有效性等主张不在本工作范围内。

Abstract: As multi-agent systems move from short interactions to tool-using workflows with specialized roles and persistent state, completion becomes a runtime-control problem rather than a purely generative one. This preprint studies verify-gated completion as an admission-control pattern for governed multi-agent runtimes: agents may propose completion, but a read-only verifier decides whether the claim is admitted. Ambiguous or weakly evidenced cases resolve fail-closed, while packetized state and event traces preserve an audit path.
  We examine one bounded reference implementation and ask what the released evidence can support about auditable, verify-gated completion. In the released verify-completed slice, the known-outcome invoked-event verify success share was 1,791/1,800 = 99.5%. This is an accounting measure over invoked verification events, not a task-completion, production-reliability, or benchmark-success rate. Task-level verify coverage is not computable; 1,762/1,801 rows came from one high-volume reporting cluster; and only 17 events were production-classified. A shadow Policy/Governance Verifier evaluation showed 1,526/1,548 = 98.58% rule agreement, 0/1,526 false-success among safe-to-proceed predictions, and blocked precision of 2/518 = 0.39%, so it remains advisory.
  The evidence supports a narrow conclusion: under observed conditions, a read-only verify gate plus packetized admission records made completion decisions inspectable and fail-closed. Claims about deployed operation, safety guarantees, outcome gains, task-level coverage, recovery effectiveness, or external validity remain outside scope.

</details>


### [465] [A-ProS: Towards Reliable Autonomous Programming Through Multi-Model Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18073)
*Anika Tabassum,Md Sifat Hossain,Md. Fahim Arefin,Tariqul Islam,Tarannum Shaila Zaman*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出A-ProS，一个结合多模型反馈框架的自主AI智能体，通过分离代码生成与专门调试，在竞争性编程任务中显著提升代码生成效果。在367道难题上，GPT-5工作流从39道初始通过提升至85-90道；有状态优化比无状态方法提升8.5-10.6个百分点，并减少3.5倍重复失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM在自动化代码生成方面展现出强大潜力，但其利用执行反馈进行迭代优化的能力仍未充分探索。竞争性编程因需要端到端算法推理、严格的实现约束和完整的正确性评估，成为理想的测试平台。

Method: 提出A-ProS自主AI智能体，采用混合多模型反馈框架，将解决方案生成与专门调试分离。结合ChatGPT生成器（GPT-4和GPT-5）与三种调试批评者（Codestral-2508、Llama-3.3-70B、DeepSeek-R1），形成2 x 3因子设计，评估六种工作流。

Result: 在367道ICPC World Finals和Codeforces题目上：GPT-5工作流从39道初始通过提升至85-90道；GPT-4从15道提升至31-38道。有状态优化比无状态方法提升8.5-10.6个百分点，减少3.5倍重复失败；相比基线智能体循环，A-ProS提升超2倍。

Conclusion: 研究表明，持续上下文（有状态优化）和多模型反馈对于实现可靠的自主程序合成至关重要，A-ProS框架显著优于传统基线方法。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate strong potential for automated code generation, yet their ability to iteratively refine solutions using execution feedback remains underexplored. Competitive programming offers an ideal testbed for this investigation, as it demands end-to-end algorithmic reasoning, precise implementation under strict computational constraints, and complete functional correctness with rigorous evaluation. In this paper, we present A-ProS, an autonomous AI agent that solves competitive programming problems through a hybrid multi-model feedback framework separating solution generation from specialized debugging. A-ProS combines ChatGPT-based generators (GPT-4 and GPT-5) with three debugging critics: Codestral-2508, Llama-3.3-70B, and DeepSeek-R1, under a 2 x 3 factorial design. We evaluate six workflows on 367 problems from ICPC World Finals (2011-2024) and Codeforces (rated 1200-1800). The results show that GPT-5 workflows improve from 39 initial accepted solutions to 85-90 after three refinement rounds, while GPT-4 improves from 15 to 31-38. A controlled ablation on 47 problems shows that stateful refinement outperforms stateless approaches by 8.5-10.6 percentage points and reduces repeated failures by up to 3.5x. Compared to baseline agent loops, A-ProS achieves over 2x greater gains, highlighting the importance of persistent context and multi-model feedback for reliable autonomous program synthesis.

</details>


### [466] [Three Heads Are Better Than One: A Multi-perspective Reasoning Framework for Enhanced Vulnerability Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18153)
*Xin Peng,Bo Lin,Jing Wang,Xiaoling Li,Jun Ma,Jie Yu,Xiaoguang Mao,Shangwen Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ReasonVul 提出多视角推理框架，通过三个LLM智能体的认知协同与辩论机制，在漏洞检测任务上显著超越基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的漏洞检测方法（如Vul-RAG、VulnSage）依赖单一推理范式，难以应对真实漏洞的复杂多样性，亟需一种融合多视角推理的框架。

Method: ReasonVul 框架包含三个专门化的LLM智能体，各自代表不同的推理模式。先对源代码进行独立分析，再通过结构化辩论机制（迭代反驳与修订）解决冲突，最终收敛为协作判断。

Result: 在PrimeVul数据集上，PairAcc达40.00%，F1-score为72.52%，PairAcc较最优基线提升81.24%；在JITVUL数据集上PairAcc为28.67%；542个冲突案例中389个被正确解决。

Conclusion: 多视角推理与协作验证对于实现鲁棒且全面的漏洞检测至关重要，辩论驱动的错误修正机制能有效发现隐藏漏洞。

Abstract: Automated vulnerability detection is crucial for enhancing software security by identifying potential flaws that attackers could exploit, thereby reducing the reliance on labor-intensive manual code audits. Recent advancements have shifted towards leveraging large language models (LLMs) for vulnerability detection, with techniques like Vul-RAG and VulnSage demonstrating progress through structured prompting and external knowledge integration. However, these approaches typically rely on a single reasoning paradigm, limiting their ability to address the complex and diverse nature of real-world vulnerabilities. To overcome these limitations, we propose ReasonVul, a novel multi-perspective reasoning framework that harnesses cognitive synergy among three specialized LLM agents, each embodying a distinct reasoning mode. The framework begins with independent analyses of the source code, followed by a structured debate mechanism to resolve conflicts through iterative rebuttal and revision, ultimately converging on a collaborative judgment. Evaluated on the PrimeVul dataset, ReasonVul achieves a PairAcc of 40.00% and an F1-score of 72.52%, surpassing the best baseline by 81.24% in PairAcc. Further tests on the JITVUL dataset confirm its generalizability, with a PairAcc of 28.67%. Additionally, we analyzed 542 conflict cases and found that 389 were correctly resolved, highlighting the framework's ability to uncover hidden vulnerabilities through the error-correction mechanism driven by the debate. This work emphasizes the importance of multi-perspective reasoning and collaborative validation in achieving robust and comprehensive vulnerability detection in real-world software systems.

</details>


### [467] [CommitDistill: A Lightweight Knowledge-Centric Memory Layer for Software Repositories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18284)
*Divya Chukkapalli,Thejesh Avula,Aditya Aggarwal,Harsimran Singh,Amith Tallanki*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: CommitDistill 是一个开源 Python 原型，通过确定性正则表达式将 git 历史提取为类型化知识单元（事实、技能、模式），并使用 TF-IDF 检索器（阈值 θ=2.5）在无嵌入、无外部依赖的本地环境下实现预算约束检索，在 256 字符预算下 hit-rate 达 0.750，远超 BM25 和 git log --grep。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件仓库中积累了大量的非结构化知识（提交消息、PR 讨论、issue 线程），但开发者和 AI 编码助手很少有效重用这些历史信息。现有工作（MemGPT、生成式智能体等）表明智能体记忆应被蒸馏为类型化知识而非原始交互文本，作者将此观点适配到 git 历史的确定性知识提取中。

Method: 提出 CommitDistill，使用确定性正则表达式从本地 git 历史中提取三类类型化知识单元（Facts、Skills、Patterns），通过 TF-IDF 检索器配合校准的静默阈值（θ=2.5）实现分布外查询的弃权机制。系统具有确定性、无依赖、纯本地、无嵌入、可检查的纯 JSON 存储等特性。

Result: 五个公共仓库（25,000 提交，1,167 个抽取单元）上，40 个双标注 Python 单元的 useful-precision 0.525，Cohen's kappa 0.633。在 256 字符预算下，CommitDistill hit-rate 0.750，远超 BM25（0.333）和 git log --grep（0.083）。但在 4 臂 LLM-as-Judge 评估（n=200）中，无条件产生统计显著的提升。10,000 提交的提取在 4 秒内完成。

Conclusion: CommitDistill 在预算约束检索场景下显著优于基线方法，且具有确定性、可审计、无外部依赖等实用优势；但在端到端 bug-fix 任务中未观察到统计显著的提升，表明类型化知识提取的效益可能依赖于更精细的集成策略而非简单检索。

Abstract: Software repositories accumulate large amounts of unstructured knowledge in commit messages, pull-request discussions, and issue threads, but developers and AI coding assistants rarely reuse this history effectively. Recent work on typed-memory architectures for LLM agents (MemGPT, generative agents, and the PlugMem module of Yang et al.) argues that agent memory should be distilled, typed knowledge rather than raw interaction text. We adapt that stance to a software repository's own git history under a constrained regime: deterministic, dependency-free, local-only, no embeddings. We present CommitDistill, an open-source Python prototype that mines a local git history into typed knowledge units (Facts, Skills, Patterns) using deterministic regex and surfaces them through a TF-IDF retriever with a calibrated silence threshold (theta = 2.5) that abstains on out-of-distribution queries. The artefact is a trust-instrumented memory substrate: deterministic, no external service, inspectable plain-JSON store, tunable abstention. A case study on five public repositories spanning Python, JavaScript, C, and Java (25,000 commits, 1,167 extracted units) reports useful-precision 0.525 at Cohen's kappa = 0.633 on 40 dual-annotated Python units. The decisive finding is budget-constrained retrieval: at a 256-character per-query budget, CommitDistill reaches 0.750 hit-rate on a 12-query benchmark against BM25's 0.333 and git log --grep's 0.083. On a four-arm paired LLM-as-judge evaluation (n=200 time-travel bug-fixes, two judges) covering control, CommitDistill, a body-budget-matched CD-Hybrid, and BM25, no condition produces a statistically detectable lift over control on the headline mean and CD-Hybrid is indistinguishable from BM25 head-to-head. Extraction over 10,000 commits completes in under 4 seconds on a laptop. Source, annotations, baselines, and a reproducibility script accompany this paper.

</details>


### [468] [Same Signal, Different Semantics: A Cross-Framework Behavioral Analysis of Software Engineering Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18332)
*Wei Ma,Zhi Chen,Jingxu Gu,Tianling Li,Shangqing Liu,Lingxiao Jiang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模实验（64,380次SWE-bench运行，126个智能体配置，覆盖43个框架）发现，LLM-based软件工程智能体的行为-效果关系在不同框架间存在显著分歧，许多信号的方向甚至完全相反，表明单一框架得出的行为规律缺乏泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究从单一框架中提取行为规则（如测试步骤在代码修改之后、错误级联短、轨迹紧凑等与高解决率相关），但这些规则是否跨框架迁移（包括方向和幅度）尚未被直接检验。

Method: 生态系统级大规模实验：64,380次SWE-bench运行，126个智能体配置（43个框架×LLM组合），通过固定LLM换框架或固定框架换LLM来分离框架效应与LLM效应，逐配置测量行为-效果关系并比较其一致性。

Result: 框架切换导致所有行为特征出现巨大差异。多数信号上不同配置不仅在幅度上分歧，方向上也相反。错误率是最典型案例：47个配置中低错误率对应更高解决率，48个配置中高错误率反而对应更高解决率。框架身份解释的方差（如平均轮次64%）远大于LLM家族（10%）。

Conclusion: 相同行为信号对不同智能体配置可能具有相反含义，单一框架的行为发现需要跨配置验证才能声称具有一般性。

Abstract: Behavioral studies of LLM-based software engineering agents extract operational rules about which trajectory shapes correlate with higher resolution rates: that a test step follows a code modification, that error cascades are short, or that trajectories are compact. Each rule is typically derived from a single framework, and whether it transfers, in sign as well as magnitude, to structurally different agent designs has not been directly tested.
  We address this at ecosystem scale: 64,380 SWE-bench runs from 126 agent configurations spanning 43 frameworks, where each configuration pairs an LLM with a framework (e.g., SWE-Agent, OpenHands) that supplies its tools and workflow. We separate framework effects from LLM effects by holding each layer fixed in turn, then measure one behavior-outcome effect per configuration and examine how those effects agree or disagree.
  Swapping the framework while the LLM is held fixed produces large behavioral differences in every action feature. On most signals, configurations disagree not merely in magnitude but in direction. Error rate is the cleanest case: 47 configurations resolve more issues when their error rate is lower, while 48 resolve more when it is higher. Five other continuous features and three of seven binary patterns from prior SE literature show similar directional disagreement. Framework identity accounts for more of this variation than LLM family: for mean turns, framework explains 64% of the between-configuration variance against the LLM's 10%.
  The implication is that the same observable behavioral signal can carry opposite meaning for different agent configurations. Behavioral findings from any single framework therefore warrant cross-configuration validation before being claimed as general.

</details>


### [469] [One Developer Is All You Need: A Case Study of an AI-Augmented One-Person Squad in a Brownfield Enterprise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18461)
*Marcelo Vilas Boas,Gustavo Pinto,Edward Roberto Monteiro,Vinicius Fernandes Carida,Danilo Ribeiro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过案例研究，展示了一名高级工程师在Spec-Driven Development工作流下，借助4个AI智能体，以一人团队（One-Person Squad）的形式完成了原本需要四人团队的项目，交付时间缩短一半，代码首次审查通过率90%，集成测试全通过，直接人力成本降低85%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI工具使工程师能够吸收原本跨职能团队的角色，但缺乏在受监管企业环境中"一人团队"模式的结构化证据，组织采用此模型时缺乏设计决策和失效条件的指导。

Method: 采用案例研究方法，在受监管企业环境中，让一名资深工程师在Spec-Driven Development工作流下，借助4个AI智能体，交付一个棕地产品项目（原计划由四人团队完成）。

Result: 项目交付时间减半，AI生成代码首次审查通过率90%，集成测试全部通过，直接人力成本降低85%以上。

Conclusion: AI并非替代团队成员，而是放大留任资深工程师的吞吐能力；决定一人团队成功与否的瓶颈约束在于规范质量（Specification Quality）和机构知识（Institutional Knowledge），而非模型能力本身。

Abstract: AI tools are enabling engineers to absorb roles previously distributed across cross-functional squads, yet there is little structured evidence on how to design or evaluate such a one-person squad in a regulated enterprise setting. Without that evidence, organizations adopting this model lack guidance on which design decisions make it viable and which conditions cause it to break down. We report a case study in which a single staff engineer, supported by four AI agents under a Spec-Driven Development workflow, delivered a brownfield product initiative scoped for a four-person squad in half the planned time, with 90\% acceptance of AI-generated code on first review, full integration test pass rates, and an above-85\% reduction in direct staffing cost. The results indicate that AI does not replace team members it multiplies the throughput of the experienced engineer who remains, making specification quality and institutional knowledge, not model capability, the binding constraints on one-person squad success.

</details>


### [470] [Overeager Coding Agents: Measuring Out-of-Scope Actions on Benign Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18583)
*Yubin Qu,Ying Zhang,Yanjun Zhang,Gelei Deng,Yuekang Li,Leo Yu Zhang,Yi Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究代码智能体在执行用户良性请求时超出授权范围执行额外操作（即"过度积极行为"）的问题。提出了OverEager-Gen基准和OverEager-Bench，包含500个验证场景和约7500次运行，发现移除许可声明会使过度积极率从0%升至17.1%，不同框架和模型间的差异显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注代码智能体的能力失败、提示注入和沙箱逃逸问题，但忽略了其"做得比用户要求更多"这一独特的授权问题。作者希望通过构建专门基准来系统研究这种过度积极行为。

Method: 提出了OverEager-Gen基准构建方法，包含行为梯度验证器确保场景判别力，通过PATH注入垫片和智能体事件流双通道栈审计内部工具调用，并生成字节完全相同的consent_kept和consent_stripped变体。最终构建了OverEager-Bench，包含500个验证场景。

Result: 在Claude Code上，移除许可声明使过度积极率从0.0%升至17.1%（McNemar精确p=2.4×10^-4）。在四个智能体产品和六个基础模型上的约7500次运行中，移除许可使每个共享基础模型的过度积极率提升了11.9-17.2个百分点。Claude Code、Codex CLI、Gemini CLI等许可型框架运行在5.4-27.7%，而OpenHands的ask-to-continue框架仅为0.2-4.5%。框架内基础模型差异达15.9个百分点。

Conclusion: 代码智能体的过度积极行为是一个严重的授权问题，许可声明的存在会显著影响智能体的边界推断能力。框架级别的权限控制（如ask-to-continue）比模型层对齐更有效，模型层的对齐无法完全渗透通过许可权限门控。

Abstract: Coding agents now run autonomously with shell, file, and network privileges. When a user issues a benign request, the agent sometimes does more than asked: it deletes unrelated files, wipes a stale credentials backup, or rewrites configuration the user never mentioned.
