We call these scope expansions overeager actions, an authorization problem distinct from capability failures, prompt injection, or sandbox escapes.
  We present OverEager-Gen, a benchmark dedicated to overeager behavior on benign tasks. Building it surfaces a measurement-validity issue: if a benchmark spells out the authorized scope inside the prompt, the agent stops inferring boundaries and starts pattern-matching declaration text. On Claude Code, stripping the consent declaration alone raises the overeager rate from 0.0% to 17.1% on paired scenarios (McNemar exact p = 2.4 x 10^-4). OverEager-Gen therefore certifies each scenario's discriminative power before admission via a behavioral-gradient validator, audits internal tool calls through a dual-channel stack (PATH-injected shim plus per-agent event streams), and ships byte-identical consent_kept and consent_stripped variants.
  OverEager-Bench contains 500 validated scenarios and ~7,500 runs across four agent products (Claude Code, OpenHands, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI) and six base models; a 50-sample re-annotation gives Cohen's kappa = 0.73 and rule-judge recall = 1.00. Stripping consent multiplies the overeager rate on every shared base model (Delta in [11.9, 17.2] pp). The framework axis dominates effect size: a permissive cluster (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI) runs at 5.4-27.7% while the ask-to-continue framework (OpenHands) sits at 0.2-4.5% (Fisher p <= 10^-5). Within-framework base-model variance reaches 15.9 pp, indicating that model-layer alignment does not fully propagate through permissive permission gating.

</details>


### [471] [Reversa: A Reverse Documentation Engineering Framework for Converting Legacy Software into Operational Specifications for AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18684)
*Sanderson Oliveira de Macedo,Ronaldo Martins da Costa*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Reversa 是一个将遗留系统转换为可追溯操作规范的多智能体逆向文档工程框架，通过专门的智能体管道（映射、分析、提取规则、综合架构、编写规范、审查）生成带置信度标记的可追溯规范，并在 COBOL 到 Go 的 ATM 迁移案例中产生了 517 条主张、10 个缺口和 53 个 Gherkin 场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遗留系统蕴含了大量隐性的业务规则、架构决策和运维异常，这些知识隐含在代码、数据、配置和维护实践中，缺乏明确的文档化规范。而基于语言模型的编码代理需要可靠的上下文、正确性标准和行为契约才能低风险地修改真实系统。现有工具缺乏将这些隐性知识转化为 AI 代理可用的结构化规范的能力。

Method: 采用多智能体管道架构：① 项目表面映射智能体（扫描项目结构）；② 模块分析智能体（深入分析各模块）；③ 隐式规则提取智能体（从代码、数据、配置中挖掘隐含规则）；④ 架构综合智能体（重构架构描述）；⑤ 单元级规范编写智能体（生成细粒度规范）；⑥ 审查智能体（验证生成结果）。框架强调三个机制：代码与规范间的可追溯性、显式的置信度标记、保留缺口供人工验证。实现为 Node.js CLI，跨多个代理引擎安装技能，使用 SHA-256 清单保护修改文件。

Result: 在 COBOL 到 Go 的 ATM 迁移案例研究中：生成 517 条带置信度分类的主张、10 个注册缺口、53 个 Gherkin 场景（用于行为驱动开发的测试用例）、重建计划中 11 项任务完成 9 项。但最终的对等验证和切换未完成。论文不宣称广泛的实证优越性。

Conclusion: Reversa 将逆向工程、LLM 驱动的文档生成和软件代理技术相结合，提供了一种将遗留系统转换为 AI 代理可用规范的系统化方法。论文提出了一个评估协议，涵盖覆盖率、可追溯性、置信度、效用和成本等指标，为后续研究提供了评估框架。

Abstract: Legacy systems concentrate business rules, architectural decisions, and operational exceptions that often remain implicit in code, data, configuration, and
  maintenance practices. At the same time, language-model-based coding agents depend on reliable context, correctness criteria, and behavioral contracts to
  modify real systems with lower risk. This paper presents Reversa, a reverse documentation engineering framework for converting legacy software into
  traceable operational specifications for AI agents. Reversa organizes this process as a multi-agent pipeline: specialized agents map the project surface,
  analyze modules, extract implicit rules, synthesize architecture, write unit-level specifications, and review generated claims. The proposal emphasizes
  three mechanisms: traceability between code and specification, explicit confidence marking, and preservation of gaps for human validation. The framework is
  distributed as a Node.js CLI, installs skills across multiple agent engines, and uses a SHA-256 manifest to preserve modified files during update or
  uninstall operations. In addition to the architectural description, we report an exploratory case study on migrating an ATM from COBOL to Go, in which the
  pipeline produced 517 claims classified by an internal confidence index, 10 registered gaps, 53 Gherkin parity scenarios, and a reconstruction plan with 9
  of 11 tasks completed at inventory time. Final parity validation and cutover were not completed in this study. We do not claim broad empirical superiority;
  we position the contribution with respect to the literature on reverse engineering, LLM-based documentation, and software agents, and propose an evaluation
  protocol with metrics for coverage, traceability, confidence, utility, and cost.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [472] [Online Contract Selection for Continual Coverage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16601)
*Qinge Chi,Sebastian Perez-Salazar*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了在线合同选择问题，在两种模型（延迟模型和并发模型）下，设计了基于分位数的在线算法，实现了最优竞争比的分析与改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在系统需要持续通过采购合同来维持运行的应用场景中，面临价格不确定性的在线合同选择问题具有重要的现实意义。

Method: 采用竞争比分析框架，利用线性规划和分位数空间的对偶论证，设计基于分位数的在线算法，并将其转化为实用的阈值算法。

Result: 延迟模型下给出了最优竞争比精确刻画（渐近ζ*≈2.472）；并发模型下竞争比下界ζ*，上界4.179，改进了已有结果（下界2.148，上界6.052）。同时证明了独立非同分布情形下不存在有限竞争比。

Conclusion: 本文显著改进了在线合同选择问题的竞争比边界，揭示了价格分布性质对可竞争性的深刻影响：i.i.d.下可达到有限竞争比，而仅独立非同分布则无法保证有限竞争比。

Abstract: Motivated by applications where a system must remain operational via continual procurement of contracts, we study two online contract selection problems under uncertain prices. At each time step, a price drawn from a known distribution is revealed online, and the decision-maker may initiate a contract of arbitrary duration, incurring a cost equal to the product of the price and the contract length; moreover, every time period must be covered by at least one active contract. We consider two models depending on how contracts cover time: a \emph{deferred model}, in which contracts are queued back-to-back, and a \emph{concurrent model}, in which contracts become active immediately and may overlap. In both settings, we seek online algorithms that minimize their competitive ratio, i.e., the ratio between the expected cost incurred by the online algorithm and the expected offline optimal cost when all prices are known in advance.
  We first focus on the case where prices are independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.). For the deferred model, we characterize exactly the worst-case optimal competitive ratio, which is asymptotically $ζ^* \approx 2.472$ as the time horizon grows. For the concurrent model, we prove a lower bound of $ζ^*$ on the optimal competitive ratio and an asymptotic competitive ratio of at most $4.179$. These bounds improve upon the current lower bound of $2.148$ and upper bound of $6.052$ on the optimal competitive ratio. For both models, our algorithms are quantile-based that can be easily translated into practical threshold-based algorithms for any distribution. Our proofs follow from linear programs and duality arguments in quantile spaces. Lastly, we show that, in both models, no finite competitive ratio exists when the prices are still independent but not necessarily identically distributed, proving a striking division in the two price settings.

</details>


### [473] [A Truthful Multiunit Profit-Optimal Mechanism for Synthesizing Social Laws](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16853)
*Jun Wu,Jian Huang,Chongjun Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究策略性多智能体环境中的社会法律综合( SLS )问题，将其建模为基于交替时态逻辑( ATL )的贝叶斯单参数采购拍卖，并提出了一个激励相容、个体理性且期望利润最优的机制 $\mathcal{PO\text{-}ASL}$。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在策略性多智能体环境中，社会法律的制定需要考虑智能体自利行为，传统机制设计方法难以处理多单元设置中的不规则支付问题，需要一种既能保证激励相容又能实现利润最大化的可行方案。

Method: (1) 证明表示引理：任意尊重交替互模拟的估值可被紧凑表示为ATL公式的特征集；(2) 在多项式时间内将支付确定约简为分配确定，解决不规则支付问题；(3) 证明分配确定是 $FP^{NP}$-完全的，并将ATL语义编码为整数线性规划(ILP)约束，利用标准求解器求解；(4) 基于这些结果设计 $\mathcal{PO\text{-}ASL}$ 机制。

Result: $\mathcal{PO\text{-}ASL}$ 机制满足激励相容、个体理性，并最大化期望利润。分配确定问题被证明是 $FP^{NP}$-完全的，但通过ILP编码可使用标准求解器高效处理。

Conclusion: 该工作为策略性智能体行为下合成最优社会法律提供了有效且计算可行的解决方案，理论保证和示例验证了方法的有效性。

Abstract: This paper studies Social Law Synthesis (SLS) in strategic multi-agent environments as a new multi-unit mechanism design problem. We model SLS as a Bayesian single-parameter procurement auction based on Alternating-time Temporal Logic (ATL) and aim to design a truthful, individually rational, and profit-optimal mechanism. We first prove a representation lemma showing that any valuation respecting alternating bisimulation can be compactly expressed as a feature set of ATL formulae. We then reduce payment determination to allocation determination in polynomial time, resolving the irregular payment issue inherent in multi-unit settings. We further show that allocation determination is \(FP^{NP}\)-complete and encode ATL semantics into integer linear programming (ILP) constraints to make the problem tractable with standard solvers. Based on these results, we present the $\mathcal{PO\text{-}ASL}$ mechanism, which is incentive-compatible, individually rational, and maximizes expected profit. Theoretical guarantees and examples confirm that our approach provides an effective and computationally feasible solution for synthesizing optimal social laws under strategic agent behavior.

</details>


### [474] [Beyond the briscola advantage: a Monte Carlo dominance test for deterministic strategies in two-player Briscola Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17043)
*Piero Giacomelli*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文通过蒙特卡洛模拟和统计检验，验证了意大利纸牌游戏Briscola中"王牌数量决定胜负"的传统观点。研究发现，两种确定性规则策略（囤积王牌策略和公共信息反制策略）在性能上显著优于贪婪基线策略，且策略选择对胜负的影响比王牌运气更大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验Briscola纸牌游戏中流行的民间传说——即游戏胜负几乎完全由发牌时获得的王牌（briscola）数量决定，挑战这一"近乎确定性的发牌函数"的观点。

Method: 采用轮循蒙特卡洛锦标赛方法，在三种策略（贪婪基线策略G、囤积王牌策略H、公共信息反制策略C）的九种有序配对组合中模拟了10^6局游戏，每配对保留约1.08×10^5局非平局游戏。使用Wilson置信区间、Bonferroni校正的成对二项检验和逻辑回归分析游戏结果。

Result: 两种确定性规则策略（囤积王牌策略和公共信息反制策略）在性能上显著优于贪婪基线策略，表明策略选择对游戏结果有重要影响，而非单纯由王牌运气决定。

Conclusion: 推翻了民间传说中"游戏几乎完全由发牌王牌数量决定"的观点，证实策略因素相比王牌运气对胜负具有更大的贡献。研究还提供了可完全复现的代码和数据分析脚本。

Abstract: Briscola is a traditional Italian trick-taking card game whose simplest form is played by two players. Popular folklore credits victory almost entirely to the player who is dealt more cards of the trump suit (the so-called \emph{briscola}), so that the game would be a near-deterministic function of the deal. We test this folklore against a pre-registered alternative, namely that two deterministic rule-based refinements of the naive greedy policy -- a briscola-hoarding policy $\stratH$ and a public-information counter policy $\stratC$ -- dominate the greedy baseline $\stratG$ irrespective of trump luck. To this end we run a round-robin Monte Carlo tournament of $10^{6}$ simulated games across the nine ordered pairings of $(\stratG,\stratH,\stratC)$, retaining approximately $1.08\times 10^{5}$ non-tied games per pairing, and we analyse the resulting outcomes through Wilson confidence intervals, a Bonferroni-corrected pairwise binomial test, and a logistic regression of the game outcome on the strategy pair and on the signed briscola-count imbalance, so as to quantify the relative contribution of strategy and trump luck. We close with a reproducibility appendix that makes the simulation, the random seed and the analysis script fully deterministic.

</details>


### [475] [Classification aggregation: a quantitative impossibility theorem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17136)
*Yuval Filmus*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究分类聚合中的满射性条件，证明即使放松到概率满射性，只要聚合函数非平凡且满足公民主权，聚合机制仍是独裁的。同时给出了无假设下保证满射性的机制特征描述。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者旨在推广Maniquet-Mongin和Cailloux等人的不可能性结果，将"结果必须满射"的确定性要求放松到概率性要求（以1-ε概率满射），并探究在更弱的假设下独裁结论是否依然成立。

Method: 利用Alekseev和Filmus的一般性组合结果，结合概率分析和对称i.i.d.分布假设，对聚合机制进行刻画；同时通过等价关系聚合的例子展示方法的更广泛适用性。

Result: 证明了在概率满射（1-ε）条件下，若聚合函数远非常数，则独裁结论仍然成立；还刻画了无任何假设时保证确定满射的所有聚合机制。

Conclusion: 满射性条件对聚合机制施加了极强的限制，即使放松到概率性要求，只要聚合函数非平凡，独裁性不可避免。所采用的代数组合方法具有更广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: A group of individuals wishes to classify $m$ objects into $n$ categories in such a way that no class is left empty, a condition known as surjectivity. The opinions of the individuals are aggregated separately for each object using an aggregation function that can depend on the object.
  Maniquet and Mongin showed that if the aggregation functions are unanimous and the outcome must always be surjective, then the aggregation mechanism is dictatorial. Cailloux et al. showed that the same holds even if unanimity is relaxed to citizen sovereignty (each object can be classified into any category).
  We show that similar results hold even if we only require the outcome to be surjective with probability $1-ε$ (with respect to an arbitrary symmetric i.i.d. distribution), provided that the aggregation functions are far from being constant.
  On the way, we characterize all aggregation mechanisms whose outcome is always surjective without any assumptions on the aggregation functions.
  Our approach uses a general result of Alekseev and Filmus which has wider applicability. We illustrate this by proving a similar impossibility result for aggregating equivalence relations.

</details>


### [476] [Probabilistic Mechanism Design in Diffusion Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17221)
*Xinlun Zhang,Zhechen Li,Yongzhi Cao,Yu Huang,Hanpin Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出概率扩散机制（PDM）及其多种变体，旨在社交网络扩散拍卖中同时实现激励相容、非负收益和近似效率，并通过扩展到一般网络结构、抵御Sybil攻击和买家合谋，以及处理多单位拍卖场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散拍卖机制无法同时满足激励相容、非负收益和具有常数近似界的近似效率这三个理想性质，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出针对路径图的概率扩散机制（PDM）；通过映射$f$推广至一般网络结构得到$f$-PDM；进一步引入抵抗合谋的变体；针对多单位扩散拍卖设计MUPDM和SP-MUPDM。

Result: PDM在路径图上同时满足激励相容、非负收益和近似效率；$f$-PDM保留了关键性质且在$f$满足广度优先顺序时还具备Sybil抗性和近似收益；多单位扩展MUPDM实现近似效率与激励相容；SP-MUPDM抵御Sybil攻击。

Conclusion: 该工作为社交网络扩散拍卖提供了首个同时满足多个关键性质的理论框架，并有效拓展至多单位及抗攻击场景。

Abstract: A diffusion auction refers to a selling process conducted over a social network, where each participant submits a bid and may invite other potential buyers to join the auction. Although various mechanisms have been proposed, none of them can simultaneously achieve incentive compatibility, non-negative revenue, and approximate efficiency with a constant approximation bound. In this paper, we propose the Probabilistic Diffusion Mechanism (PDM), a novel mechanism tailored for path graphs, which satisfies all three desired properties. We further extend PDM to general network structures through a map $f$, resulting in the $f$-PDM mechanism, which preserves the key properties of the original design. Beyond these, when $f$ satisfies properties such as breadth-first order, $f$-PDM also ensures Sybil-proofness and provides approximate revenue. Furthermore, to address buyer collusion, we introduce a modified version of the mechanism that balances collusion-proofness with revenue approximation. Finally, we extend the design to multi-unit diffusion auctions -- a more challenging setting -- and propose a simple yet effective mechanism, Multi-Unit PDM (MUPDM), that achieves approximate efficiency while maintaining IC. Moreover, we design Sybil-Proof MUPDM (SP-MUPDM) to resist Sybil attacks in the multi-item scenario.

</details>


### [477] [Convergence of Stochastic First-Order Algorithms in Bertrand Competition Under Incomplete Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17607)
*Martin Bichler,Jan-Sebastian Hoehener*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究贝叶斯伯特兰竞争下的正则化Robbins-Monro算法，证明了即使在标准稳定性条件不满足的情况下，欧几里得RRM算法仍几乎必然收敛到唯一有效的贝叶斯纳什均衡，为随机一阶学习算法提供了严格收敛保证，并对算法共谋的说法提出了有原则的反驳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对现有关于自主定价算法共谋的实验研究大多基于完全信息环境下的Q学习且缺乏严格收敛保证的问题，本文希望在更现实的贝叶斯伯特兰竞争（私有成本）框架下，为随机学习算法提供严谨的收敛性分析。

Method: 采用正则化Robbins-Monro (RRM)算法，在有限维策略空间近似下分析贝叶斯伯特兰竞争；通过考虑对称分段线性定价策略的双寡头场景，显式构造投影原始动力学的全局Lyapunov函数，建立均衡的全局渐近稳定性。

Result: 证明了在违反标准单调性和Minty变分不等式条件下，欧几里得RRM算法仍几乎必然收敛到唯一且有效的贝叶斯纳什均衡；严格建立了随机一阶学习算法的收敛保证。

Conclusion: 该分析为贝叶斯伯特兰竞争中的随机一阶学习算法提供了严格的收敛保证，并对广泛声称的算法共谋现象提供了一个有原则的反驳视角。

Abstract: Autonomous pricing agents are widely deployed in online marketplaces, making algorithmic pricing a prominent application of multi-agent learning. Experimental studies often report collusive outcomes, but these findings typically rely on Q-learning in complete-information environments and lack rigorous convergence guarantees. In this paper, we study the stochastic learning dynamics of Regularized Robbins-Monro (RRM) algorithms in a Bayesian Bertrand competition with private costs. We show that this setting violates standard stability conditions, including monotonicity and the Minty variational inequality, rendering classical convergence results for gradient-based learning inapplicable. Despite this, we prove that Euclidean RRM algorithms converge almost surely to the unique, efficient Bayes-Nash equilibrium within a finite-dimensional approximation of the strategy space. By analyzing symmetric piecewise-linear pricing strategies in a duopoly, we explicitly construct a global Lyapunov function for the projected primal dynamics and establish global asymptotic stability of the equilibrium. Our analysis yields rigorous convergence guarantees for stochastic first-order learning algorithms in Bayesian Bertrand competition and provides a principled counterpoint to widespread claims of algorithmic collusion.

</details>


### [478] [On the Complexity of Correlated Equilibria Beyond Normal-Form Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17665)
*Ioannis Anagnostides,Constantinos Daskalakis,Gabriele Farina,Noah Golowich,Tuomas Sandholm,Brian Hu Zhang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了凹博弈中相关均衡的计算复杂性问题。证明了计算二次凹博弈的相关均衡等价于计算压缩映射的不动点（Contr-hard），并给出了无条件的指数级下界。同时提出了计算多维Φ-均衡的FPTAS，并针对二次凹博弈给出了多项式时间算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Papadimitriou和Roughgarden (JACM '08)提出的长期开放问题：理解除多项式型博弈外（如扩展式博弈、拥堵博弈、凹博弈）相关均衡的计算复杂性。

Method: 1. 将凹二次博弈中计算相关均衡归约到计算压缩映射的不动点（Contr）；2. 信息论下界证明强次线性swap regret最小化器不存在；3. 提出计算多维Φ-均衡的FPTAS；4. 针对二次凹博弈设计poly(d, log(1/ε))时间算法。

Result: 1. 凹二次博弈中相关均衡是Contr-hard，即难以计算；2. 任何在线学习算法需要指数级迭代才能保证多项式swap regret；3. 对一般凹博弈，多维Φ-均衡存在FPTAS；4. 二次凹博弈中多维Φ-均衡可在多项式时间内求解。

Conclusion: 凹博弈中相关均衡的计算本质上是困难的，但通过松弛到Φ-均衡可实现可计算性。特别地，二次凹博弈为绕过这种困难提供了良好结构，同时算法可用于计算未知马氏范数下的压缩映射不动点。

Abstract: Correlated equilibria are a fundamental solution concept in game theory. However, despite decades of research, the complexity beyond games of polynomial type -- such as extensive-form games, congestion or routing games, and more broadly concave games -- has remained a major open problem, first highlighted by Papadimitriou and Roughgarden (JACM '08).
  In this paper, we resolve several long-standing questions concerning the complexity of correlated equilibria and swap regret minimization. First, we show that computing a correlated equilibrium in concave quadratic games is as hard as computing the fixed point of a contraction mapping (Contr), providing the first strong evidence of intractability. Moreover, we establish an unconditional, information-theoretic lower bound ruling out the existence of a strongly sublinear swap regret minimizer: any online learning algorithm requires exponentially many iterations in the dimension $d$ to guarantee at most $1/\text{poly}(d)$ (average) swap regret.
  To circumvent these hardness results, we examine the complexity of $Φ$-equilibria -- tractable relaxations of correlated equilibria. We obtain a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme (FPTAS) for computing poly-dimensional $Φ$-equilibria in general concave games. We complement this by showing that Contr-hardness persists even under poly-dimensional swap deviations in the regime where the precision $ε$ is exponentially small. Finally, we show that Contr-hardness can be bypassed in the canonical setting of concave \emph{quadratic games}, for which we provide a $\text{poly}(d, \log(1/ε))$-time algorithm for computing poly-dimensional $Φ$-equilibria. As a byproduct, we obtain an algorithm for computing fixed points of a mapping that is contracting with respect to an unknown Mahalanobis norm, which could be of independent interest.

</details>


### [479] [Learning Empirical Evidence Equilibria under Weak Environmental Coupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17848)
*Aya Hamed,Jason R. Marden,Jeff S. Shamma*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了在去中心化、不确定性和模糊性特征下的多智能体系统，提出了经验证据均衡（EEE）框架，证明在弱耦合条件下，独立使用Q值迭代的智能体能够收敛到EEE，并将结果扩展到softmax策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统中，智能体受限于有限观测和计算能力，需要基于简化内部模型做出决策。现有框架未能充分捕捉这种有限理性与去中心化特性下的稳态行为，因此需要一种能够刻画智能体使用错误指定信念进行决策的系统均衡理论。

Method: 构建经验证据均衡（EEE）框架，每个智能体通过部分环境观测形成可能错误指定的信念模型，独立进行Q值迭代计算并推导贪心策略；分析智能体行为与环境动态之间的耦合关系，在弱耦合条件下证明EEE的存在性，并进一步扩展到softmax策略。

Result: 证明了在智能体行为与环境之间耦合足够弱的情况下，尽管存在去中心化，联合动态仍能收敛到EEE；在softmax策略下，建立了充分耦合条件下的压缩映射结果。

Conclusion: EEE框架为有限理性与去中心化多智能体系统提供了坚实的均衡理论基础，弱耦合条件是保证系统收敛到EEE的关键因素。

Abstract: Strategic multi-agent systems are fundamentally characterized by decentralization, uncertainty, and ambiguity. Agents operating under limited observations will often need to make decisions based on simplified internal models of the environment, reflecting bounded rationality in both computational capacity and environmental knowledge. The Empirical Evidence Equilibrium (EEE) framework explicitly accounts for these limitations by modeling each agent as forming a potentially misspecified belief derived from signals obtained through partial observations of the environment. The resulting equilibrium concept captures the system's steady state under bounded rationality and decentralization. In this work, we study games in which the environment dynamics are driven jointly by exogenous factors and agents' actions. We analyze agent behavior under Q-value iteration where each agent independently forms a belief model, computes Q-values, and derives a greedy strategy, yet the collective actions of all agents jointly shape the environment each agent faces at the next stage. We prove that despite this decentralization, an EEE emerges from the joint dynamics when the coupling between agents' actions and the environment is sufficiently weak. We further extend this result to softmax policies, establishing a contraction result under a sufficient coupling condition.

</details>


### [480] [A Tractable Class of Cooperative Games Defined by Directed Networks: Unanimity Decomposition and Shapley Value](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18157)
*David Ryzák,Tomáš Kroupa*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出一类由加权有向图诱导的合作博弈，具有内部交互项和外部进入边成分，该博弈可用一致博弈表示，并得到Shapley值和Banzhaf值的闭式多项式公式，且核心非空、完全平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有网络诱导合作博弈往往计算复杂且缺乏解析可处理性，需要一种既具有结构特性又能在分析和计算上易于处理的有向图博弈模型。

Method: 定义加权有向图诱导的合作博弈：联盟价值=内部子图博弈项+外部最小入边项。利用一致博弈表示，推导Shapley与Banzhaf值的闭式多项式公式，并证明核心非空与完全平衡性质。

Result: 该博弈可用一致博弈简洁表示，Shapley和Banzhaf值可在多项式时间内计算；核心非空且博弈完全平衡；稳定性分配与公平性解概念在该类博弈中不重合。

Conclusion: 该类博弈提供了一类结构化、可解析且可计算的有向图诱导合作博弈示例，其中基于稳定性的分配与基于公平性的解概念存在分歧。

Abstract: We introduce a class of cooperative games induced by weighted directed graphs. Specifically, the coalitional value combines an internal interaction term given by the induced subgraph game with an external component based on minimal incoming edges from outside the coalition. The resulting game has a convenient representation in terms of unanimity games. This representation enables closed-form polynomial-time formulas for the Shapley and Banzhaf values. We further establish that the game has a nonempty core and is totally balanced. The class of such games therefore provides an analytically and computationally tractable example of structured network- induced cooperative games in which stability-based allocations and fairness-based solution concepts do not coincide.

</details>


### [481] [Mechanism Design for Connecting Regions Under Disruptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18626)
*Hau Chan,Jianan Lin,Zining Qin,Chenhao Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文从机制设计角度研究障碍物导致区域分离后的通路构建问题，旨在设计策略proof机制以最小化社会成本或最大成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人为或自然障碍（如道路施工、桥梁停用、泥石流阻塞等）会分隔原本相连的区域，影响agent的通行与可达性。为减少障碍影响并维持agent的可达性，需要从机制设计角度寻找最优通路构建方案。

Method: 将问题建模为机制设计问题：每个区域中的agent拥有私有位置信息，需通过新建通路（如绕行路或新桥）访问另一区域，agent的成本为其位置到通路的距离。目标是设计策略proof（激励相容）机制，使agent如实报告位置，并近似优化社会成本或最大成本。

Result: 1. 给出了所有策略proof且匿名机制的特征刻画；2. 针对社会成本和最大成本，给出了策略proof机制近似比的上界和下界。

Conclusion: 该研究从理论层面系统分析了障碍物分隔场景下的通路构建机制设计问题，提供了策略proof机制的理论边界，为实际应用中的通路选址决策提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Man-made and natural disruptions such as planned constructions on roads, suspensions of bridges, and blocked roads by trees/mudslides/floods can often create obstacles that separate two connected regions. As a result, the traveling and reachability of agents from their respective regions to other regions can be affected. To minimize the impact of the obstacles and maintain agent accessibility, we initiate the problem of constructing a new pathway (e.g., a detour or new bridge) connecting the regions disconnected by obstacles from the mechanism design perspective. In the problem, each agent in their region has a private location and is required to access the other region. The cost of an agent is the distance from their location to the other region via the pathway. Our goal is to design strategyproof mechanisms that elicit truthful locations from the agents and approximately optimize the social or maximum cost of agents by determining locations in the regions for building a pathway. We provide a characterization of all strategyproof and anonymous mechanisms. For the social and maximum costs, we provide upper and lower bounds on the approximation ratios of strategyproof mechanisms.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [482] [Dual-Diffusional Generative Fashion Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17357)
*Mingzhe Yu,Lei Wu,Qianru Sun,Yunshan Ma*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了DualFashion，一种双扩散生成式时尚推荐架构，同时建模图像和文本模态，实现个性化、可解释的推荐，在行为建模、可解释性和效率上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖历史交互中的隐式视觉嵌入，包含偏好无关信息且行为建模不足；同时仅生成物品图像，缺乏可解释性。

Method: 采用双扩散Transformer（图像分支+文本分支），以结构化属性级描述和视觉穿搭信息作为条件信号联合建模用户行为，并提出文本增强微调策略提升生成多样性并实现跨模态知识迁移。

Result: 在iFashion和Polyvore-U数据集上的个性化填空和生成式搭配推荐任务中，DualFashion在行为建模、可解释性和效率上均优于SOTA方法。

Conclusion: 双模态联合生成是提升时尚推荐个性化与可解释性的有效方向，文本增强微调策略在低成本下显著提升了生成质量。

Abstract: Personalized generative recommender systems have emerged as a promising solution for fashion recommendation. However, existing methods primarily rely on implicit visual embeddings from historical interactions, which often contain preference-irrelevant information and result in insufficient user behavior modeling. Moreover, these models typically generate only item images, providing limited interpretability. To address these limitations, we propose DualFashion, a Dual-Diffusional Generative Fashion Recommendation Architecture that jointly models image and text modalities for personalized and explainable recommendation. DualFashion adopts a dual-diffusion Transformer with image and text branches, where structured attribute-level captions and visual outfit information are jointly used as conditioning signals to model user behavior. The proposed architecture produces both fashion item images and textual descriptions, ensuring visual compatibility while providing explicit semantic interpretability. Furthermore, we introduce a text-augmented fine-tuning strategy that enhances generation diversity and enables effective cross-modal knowledge transfer without incurring heavy computational costs. Extensive experiments on iFashion and Polyvore-U across Personalized Fill-in-the-Blank and Generative Outfit Recommendation tasks demonstrate that DualFashion achieves strong performance in behavior modeling, interpretability, and efficiency compared to state-of-the-art methods. Our code and model checkpoints are available at https://github.com/LinkMingzhe/DualFashion.

</details>


### [483] [A Production-Ready RL Framework for Personalized Utility Tuning with Pareto Sweeping in Pinterest Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16344)
*Yichu Zhou,Mehdi Ben Ayed,Lin Yang,Jiacong He,Andreanne Lemay,Jiaye Wang,Jaewon Yang,Josie Zeng,Dhruvil Deven Badani,Yijie Dylan Wang,Jiajing Xu,Charles Rosenberg*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出PRL-PUTS，一个生产就绪的、与排序器无关的强化学习框架，用于个性化效用权重调优，通过Pareto前沿扫描实现多目标权衡的可视化与即时部署策略更新，在Pinterest Homefeed上取得显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推荐系统中效用层的权重调优依赖手动、全局设置，难以适应动态环境和业务需求变化，且缺乏治理机制，因此需要自动化、个性化的权重调优方法。

Method: 将效用权重调优建模为单步、基于价值的RL问题：智能体根据请求上下文选择权重向量最大化参与度奖励；通过推理时Pareto前沿扫描生成策略族，供决策者即时选择部署策略。

Result: 在Pinterest Homefeed上，PRL-PUTS相比基线实现了+0.13%的成功会话（核心参与度指标）提升，且不增加服务延迟。

Conclusion: PRL-PUTS是一种生产就绪、可治理的个性化权重调优框架，能自动化多目标权衡、支持快速策略切换且不影响服务性能。

Abstract: Large-scale recommenders encode multi-objective trade-offs by combining multiple predicted outcomes into a single utility score. Although this utility layer can be updated independently of the ranker, weight tuning remains largely manual, globally applied, slow to adapt to changing environments and business needs, and hard to govern as priorities shift. We propose PRL-PUTS, a Production-ready, ranker independent RL framework for Personalized Utility-weight Tuning with Pareto Sweeping. We cast utility tuning as a one-step, value-based RL problem: given request context, an agent selects a utility-weight vector that re-weights ranker predictions to maximize request-level engagement rewards. To visualize performance across the trade-off spectrum and allow decision makers to update the deployed operating policy instantly, we adopt an inference-time Pareto frontier sweeping via a scalarization parameter, producing a family of policies and an empirical Pareto frontier used as a governance artifact for operating policy selection. PRL-PUTS runs in parallel with ranking inference without adding serving latency. We validate PRL-PUTS with offline analysis using unbiased exploration logs and online experiments on Pinterest Homefeed where PRL-PUTS showed significant increases in engagement compared to baseline such as +0.13\% increase in successful session, a core metric for user engagement.

</details>


### [484] [LARGER: Lexically Anchored Repository Graph Exploration and Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16352)
*Yuntong Hu,Tongli Su,Liang Zhao,Bowen Zhu,Hasibul Haque*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出LARGER框架，通过将词汇匹配锚定到图结构入口点，并在智能体现有搜索循环中进行置信度过滤的局部扩展，显著提升了仓库级编码智能体的代码定位能力，在多个基准测试上取得了一致性提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仓库级编码智能体主要依赖词汇搜索来定位文件和符号，忽视了导入关系、调用链、类型层次结构和代码-测试链接等结构关系，导致定位失败会级联影响下游任务。基于图的检索虽能恢复这些依赖关系，但现有方法需要单独的图工具或遍历阶段，割裂了智能体的交互循环。

Method: 提出LARGER框架，形式化了"词汇锚定的结构定位"任务。该方法从词汇匹配出发，将其对齐到图中的锚点，然后在智能体现有搜索循环内进行置信度过滤的局部扩展，无需外部图数据库或专门的图接口，直接集成到现有的CLI编码智能体中。

Result: 在四个基准测试上：LocBench上文件级Acc@5提升+13.9个点（调参后），固定超参数仍提升+11.8个点；在MuLocBench、SWE-Atlas Test Writing和SWE-Atlas Codebase QA上也取得了一致性提升。

Conclusion: LARGER通过将词汇搜索与结构化图检索无缝集成，有效提升了仓库级编码智能体的定位能力，验证了词汇锚定结构定位方法的有效性，且无需额外基础设施即可部署。

Abstract: Repository-level coding agents must first localize the files and symbols relevant to a task; failures at this stage can cascade across downstream objectives ranging from patch generation to test writing and codebase question answering. Existing agents navigate repositories primarily through lexical search, often missing structural relations such as imports, call chains, type hierarchies, and code-test links. Graph-based retrieval can recover such dependencies, but existing approaches often require separate graph tools or traversal stages that fragment the agent's interaction loop. We formalize repository context localization as Lexically Anchored Structural Localization, where success depends on turning lexical matches into high-precision structural entry points and exposing the most useful confidence-filtered local neighborhoods within the agent's existing search loop. We introduce LARGER (Lexically Anchored Repository Graph Exploration and Retrieval), a lexically anchored active-set retrieval framework that starts from lexical matches, aligns them to graph anchors, and performs confidence-filtered local expansion within the agent's existing search loop. LARGER integrates directly into existing CLI coding agents without requiring external graph databases or specialized graph interfaces. Across four benchmarks spanning localization, test generation, and codebase understanding, LARGER improves file-level Acc@5 on LocBench by +13.9 points with tuned hyperparameters and still gains +11.8 points with fixed hyperparameters over the strongest baseline, while delivering consistent gains on MuLocBench, SWE-Atlas Test Writing, and SWE-Atlas Codebase QA.

</details>


### [485] [The Impact of AI Search on the Online Content Ecosystem: Evidence from Google and Reddit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16428)
*Peibo Zhang,Ruomeng Cui,Dennis J. Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Google AI Overviews使Reddit的SFW社区参与度提升12%（评论和用户数），但后续推出的AI Mode（会话式交互）消除了这一增益。效果集中在经验型内容，受AI搜索界面设计影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究生成式AI搜索工具（如Google AI Overviews）如何改变传统搜索引擎与内容平台（如Reddit）的关系，特别是AI直接生成摘要是否减少了用户对来源网站的访问。

Method: 利用Google的内容审核政策差异：SFW社区被AI Overviews引用，NSFW社区不被引用。采用双重差分法比较两类社区在AI Overviews推出前后的参与度变化。

Result: AI Overviews使SFW社区日评论量增加12.0%，评论用户数增加12.3%。效果集中在经验型内容（观点、建议、个人经历）而非事实型内容。后续的AI Mode（会话式交互）消除了经验型内容的增益。

Conclusion: 生成式AI搜索对内容平台的影响取决于界面设计（摘要式vs会话式）和内容类型（经验型vs事实型）。AI Overviews能引流经验型内容，但AI Mode可能替代用户访问原始平台。

Abstract: Search engines traditionally complement online content platforms by directing users seeking information to external websites. The emergence of generative AI search tools that summarize answers directly on the results page may disrupt this relationship by making visits to source platforms optional. We study this question using Google AI Overviews and Reddit, one of the largest online discussion platforms. Our identification exploits Google's content moderation policy: Safe-for-Work (SFW) Reddit communities are indexed by Google organic search and surfaced in Google AI Overviews, while Not-Safe-for-Work (NSFW) communities, though indexed by organic search, are prohibited from being referenced in AI Overview summaries. Using a difference-in-differences design, we find that AI Overviews increase engagement in SFW communities: daily comments rise by 12.0 percent and the number of commenting users by 12.3 percent relative to NSFW communities. The effects are concentrated in experience-based discussions (opinions, advice, and personal experiences) rather than fact-based information. However, the subsequent introduction of Google AI Mode, which allows users to interact conversationally with the AI summary, largely eliminates these gains in experience-based content. These results suggest that the effects of AI search depend critically on interface design and types of content.

</details>


### [486] [Modality-Aware Identity Construction and Counterfactual Structure Learning for ID-Free Multimodal Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18044)
*Hongjian Ma,Wenxin Huang,Yan Zhang,Zhifei Li,Zheng Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出MAIL方法，通过模态感知的身份构建和反事实结构学习，解决多模态推荐中ID表示静态和流行度偏差问题，在五个Amazon数据集上Recall@10提升7.81%，NDCG@10提升12.81%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态推荐方法存在两个局限：(1) 重建的ID表示较为静态，未能充分利用多模态语义；(2) 图学习过程难以挖掘潜在的长尾语义关系，且容易受到流行度偏差影响。

Method: 提出MAIL方法：(1) 模态感知身份构建模块：利用多模态语义动态调制位置编码，构建内容感知的无ID身份表示；(2) 反事实结构学习范式：通过流行度惩罚挖掘低曝光语义邻居，缓解流行度偏差。

Result: 在五个Amazon公开数据集上，MAIL相比基线模型在Recall@10上平均提升7.81%，在NDCG@10上平均提升12.81%。

Conclusion: MAIL通过动态构建模态感知的身份表示和反事实结构学习，有效提升了多模态推荐的性能，尤其在长尾语义关系挖掘和缓解流行度偏差方面表现出色。

Abstract: Multimodal recommendation has attracted extensive attention by leveraging heterogeneous modality information to alleviate data sparsity and improve recommendation accuracy. Existing methods have attempted to replace ID embeddings with multimodal features and have achieved promising preliminary results. However, these methods still exhibit the following two limitations: (1) the reconstructed ID representations remain relatively static and fail to fully exploit multimodal semantics; and (2) the graph learning process is insufficient in mining latent long-tail semantic relations and is easily affected by popularity bias. To address these issues, we propose a novel method named Modality-Aware Identity Construction and Counterfactual Structure Learning for ID-free Multimodal Recommendation (MAIL). Specifically, we design a modality-aware identity construction module that dynamically modulates positional encodings with multimodal semantics to construct content-aware ID-free identity representations. Then, we propose a counterfactual structure learning paradigm that mines low-exposure semantic neighbors via popularity penalization and alleviates popularity bias. Extensive experiments are conducted on five public Amazon datasets. Experimental results show that MAIL achieves average improvements of 7.81% in Recall@10 and 12.81% in NDCG@10 compared with the baseline models. Our code is available at https://github.com/HubuKG/MAIL.

</details>


### [487] [LERA: LLM-Enhanced RAG for Ad Auction in Generative Chatbots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16474)
*Haoran Sun,Xinrui Song,Xinyu Zhang,Zhaohua Chen,Xu Chu,Zhilin Zhang,Chuan Yu,Jian Xu,Bo Zheng,Xiaotie Deng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出LERA框架，一种针对大语言模型聊天机器人的两阶段检索-生成拍卖机制，通过嵌入粗过滤和LLM精排序来提升广告选择准确性和多样性，同时保证广告主真实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索-生成范式中，广告检索仅依赖文本嵌入相似度，导致商业语义误解和广告重复插入问题，需要更精准的广告匹配机制。

Method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段基于嵌入向量粗过滤预选少量候选广告主；第二阶段利用LLM本身通过精心设计的提示生成logits作为精细化相关性分数，结合出价及临界值支付规则，确保广告主真实出价。

Result: 在合成广告主-查询基准测试上，LERA显著提升了广告选择准确性和插入多样性，仅引入可控的延迟开销。

Conclusion: LERA为LLM聊天机器人的广告拍卖提供了一种轻量高效、真实可信的解决方案，自然支持多广告插入和动态对话场景。

Abstract: The integration of advertising auction mechanisms into large language model (LLM)-based chatbots presents a significant opportunity for commercialization, yet poses unique challenges in balancing relevance, efficiency, and user experience. Recently, Feizi et al.~\citep{feizi2023online} and Hajiaghayi et al.~\citep{hajiaghayi2024ad} outlined a retrieve-then-generate paradigm that decouples retrieval and generation, offering lightweight ad insertion and payment determination. However, current retrieval relies solely on text embedding similarity, which may lead to commercial misinterpretation and issues such as repetitive insertions. In this paper, we propose LERA, a two-stage retrieve-then-generate auction framework tailored for LLM chatbots. In the first stage, embedding-based coarse filtering pre-selects a small set of candidate advertisers. In the second stage, the LLM itself is queried with a carefully designed prompt to produce logits over candidates, which serve as refined organic relevance scores. These scores are combined with bids, and a critical-value payment rule accounts for both the coarse-filtering and fine-ranking thresholds, ensuring truthfulness for utility-maximizing advertisers. The framework naturally extends to multiple ad insertions within dynamic dialogue flows and long responses. Experiments on a synthetic advertiser-query benchmark show that LERA substantially improves ad selection accuracy and insertion diversity while incurring only controllable latency overhead.

</details>


### [488] [Policy-Grounded Dynamic Facet Suggestions for Job Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16479)
*Dan Xu,Baofen Zheng,Qianqi Shen,Jianqiang Shen,Wenqiong Liu,Chunnan Yao,Ping Liu,Rajat Arora,Kevin Kao,Hsiang Lin,Wanjun Jiang,Yusuke Takebuchi,Jingwei Wu,Wenjing Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 针对LinkedIn上超过80%的求职查询不超过3个关键词的现状，本文提出动态方面建议（DFS）机制，利用策略驱动、检索增强的排序框架，通过离线分类法、嵌入检索和小语言模型评分，实现实时个性化查询细化，显著提升了建议参与度和求职效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 求职者初始查询通常简短（关键词≤3），导致用户意图推断困难、职位检索准确率低，亟需有效的查询细化机制来消歧。

Method: 提出动态方面建议（DFS）框架，包含离线分类法构建、基于嵌入的Top-K候选检索、以及基于蒸馏小语言模型（SLM）的逐点单Token评分排序，通过批处理和前缀缓存优化实时推理性能。

Result: 离线评估显示建议生成精度高；在线A/B测试表明用户参与度和求职效果均有显著提升。

Conclusion: DFS机制能有效解决短查询下的意图歧义问题，提升了搜索引擎的交互质量和检索准确性。

Abstract: Job seekers often initiate search with short, underspecified queries. At LinkedIn, over 80% of job-related queries contain three or fewer keywords, making accurate user intent inference and relevant job retrieval particularly challenging. We present dynamic facet suggestion (DFS), an interactive query refinement mechanism that facilitates intent disambiguation by surfacing personalized semantic attributes conditioned on the joint user-query context in real time. We propose a policy-grounded, retrieval-augmented ranking framework for facet suggestion, comprising offline taxonomy curation, embedding-based retrieval of top-K candidates, and distilled small language model (SLM) based candidate scoring. The system is optimized for real-time serving via pointwise single-token scoring with batching and prefix caching. Offline evaluation demonstrates high precision for generated suggestions, and online A/B tests show significant improvements in suggestion engagement and job search outcomes.

</details>


### [489] [RAPT: Retrieval-Augmented Post-hoc Thresholding for Multi-Label Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16535)
*Lasal Jayawardena,Nirmalie Wiratunga,Ikechukwu Nkisi-Orji,Darren Nicol*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: RAPT是一个面向工业部署的检索增强分数阈值包装器，通过检索相似文档的阈值设定案例来动态调整标签集选择，无需重新训练即可提升多标签文档分类的准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工业级多标签文档理解管线依赖全局或标签级固定阈值进行标签集选择，但OCR噪声、标签不平衡、实例级标签基数差异以及不对称错误成本使得固定阈值脆弱且难以维护，亟需一种无需重新训练即可自适应调整阈值的方案。

Method: 提出RAPT，一个模型无关的检索增强后处理包装器。对每个查询文档，RAPT接收分类器的分数向量，从历史数据中检索相似文档的阈值设定案例，通过局部聚合邻居解（如平均标签数、截断校准）自适应调整查询文档的标签集选择阈值。

Result: 在工业数据集和6个公开基准上，RAPT持续优于全局和逐标签静态阈值基线。工业场景中，结合度量学习器达到0.87 Macro-F1，微调Transformer变体平均0.775 Macro-F1，比小样本LLM基线（K=5）高2倍，推理时间降低至少115倍，GPU内存降低至少13.5倍。

Conclusion: RAPT是一种高效、部署友好的标签选择优化方案，无需重新训练即可显著提升多标签文档分类的精度和鲁棒性，兼具模型无关性和显著的资源效率优势。

Abstract: Industrial multi-label document understanding pipelines score candidate labels and threshold or rank them to form a label set per document. This early selection step directly affects the accuracy of downstream information extraction from the document, as well as the associated verification effort. In practice, OCR noise, label imbalance, instance-dependent label cardinality, and asymmetric error costs make global score thresholds brittle and hard to maintain as document formats evolve. We present RAPT, a deployment-oriented retrieval-augmented score thresholding wrapper, applied post-hoc to improve label set selection without retraining the underlying classifier. RAPT is a model-agnostic wrapper: any predictor that provides document representations for similarity search and per label confidence scores can be used, including metric learning encoders and fine-tuned transformer classifiers. For each query document, given a classifier's score vector, RAPT retrieves similar document thresholding situations (cases) and adapts the query's label set selection threshold using their outcomes. The adaptation selects the final label set by locally aggregating neighbour solutions (e.g. average label count, cutoff calibration). Evaluation compared multi-label classifiers (metric learners and transformers) combined with RAPT against global and label-wise thresholding baselines, and against few-shot LLMs. Across an industrial dataset and six public benchmarks, RAPT consistently outperformed global and label-wise static thresholding baselines. In the industrial setting, RAPT achieved its best predictive performance with metric learners, reaching 0.87 Macro-F1, while fine-tuned transformer variants on average achieved 0.775 Macro-F1, outperforming fewshot LLM baselines (K = 5) by 2x and requiring at least 115x less inference time and 13.5x less GPU memory.

</details>


### [490] [UniER: A Unified Benchmark for Item-level and Path-level Exercise Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16750)
*Xinghe Cheng,Guiyong Zhuang,Yusheng Xie,Jiapu Wang,Yixin Liu,Quanlong Guan,Liangda Fang,Shirui Pan*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了UniER，一个统一了习题级推荐（ILER）和路径级推荐（PLER）的基准框架，引入加权认知增益（WCG）作为统一指标，在9个数据集上对18种方法进行了多维分析，发现PLER系统性地优于ILER，尤其在极端稀疏和噪声条件下ILER表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ILER和PLER两种个性化练习推荐范式虽然目标一致，但由于评估设置不统一，导致两条研究路线相互孤立，缺乏统一的基准测试和公平比较。

Method: 提出UniER统一基准框架，引入加权认知增益（WCG）作为跨范式统一指标，涵盖9个数据集（4种生成方法）和18种代表性ILER/PLER方法，进行多维度分析。

Result: PLER系统性地优于ILER；在极端稀疏和噪声条件下，ILER的碎片化推荐在 pedagogical 上表现失败。

Conclusion: UniER为个性化练习推荐提供了统一的评估框架，揭示了PLER的优势和ILER的局限性，并开源了代码以促进可复现研究和未来探索。

Abstract: Personalized exercise recommendation dynamically aligns pedagogical resources with individual knowledge mastery, which is crucial for satisfying students' dynamic learning needs in modern education. The field is currently driven by two dominant paradigms: Item-Level Exercise Recommendation (ILER) optimizes for immediate single-step state transitions, while Path-Level Exercise Recommendation (PLER) constructs coherent learning paths to maximize cumulative gains. Despite sharing the same ultimate objective, disparate evaluation setups have kept these two lines of research isolated, hindering unified benchmarking and fair comparison. To fill the gap, in this paper, we present a Unified Benchmark for Exercise Recommendation (UniER), a comprehensive evaluation framework that unifies ILER and PLER. Specifically, we introduce Weighted Cognitive Gain (WCG) as a unified metric to measure cross-paradigm algorithmic performance. Our benchmark encompasses 9 datasets spanning four generation methods, facilitating the comparison of 18 representative ILER/PLER methods. Through multi-dimensional analyses covering effectiveness, generalizability, robustness, and efficiency, our results reveal the systematic dominance of PLER and expose the pedagogical failure of ILER's fragmented recommendations under extreme sparsity and noise. Furthermore, we provide an open-source codebase of UniER to foster reproducible research and outline potential directions for future investigations.

</details>


### [491] [Echoes in Filter Bubble: Diagnosing and Curing Popularity Bias in Generative Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16825)
*Jun Yin,Bangguo Zhu,Peng Huo,Ruochen Liu,Hao Chen,Senzhang Wang,Shirui Pan,Chengqi Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Ghost模型，通过非对称非似然优化和骨架基础标记化两种策略，解决了生成式推荐系统中因标记级优化缺陷和语义索引标记化无差异性导致的严重流行度偏差问题，实验表明该方法能有效缓解偏差并促进更公平的推荐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式推荐系统虽展现出巨大潜力，但仍面临长期的流行度偏差问题。现有去偏方法效果有限，且偏差产生的根本原因未被充分探索。

Method: 提出Ghost模型，包含两个核心设计：(1) 非对称非似然优化 (Asymmetric Unlikelihood Optimization)，解决标记级优化缺陷；(2) 骨架基础标记化 (Skeleton-founded Tokenization)，解决语义索引标记化的无差异性问题。

Result: 在三个数据集上与多个SOTA基线对比，Ghost显著缓解了流行度偏差，促进了更公平的推荐，同时在整体推荐效用上仅有轻微下降。

Conclusion: 生成式推荐系统的流行度偏差源于标记级优化缺陷和标记化无差异性的共同作用，Ghost通过针对性设计有效缓解了该问题，为生成式推荐中的去偏研究提供了新方向。

Abstract: Recently, Generative Recommenders (GRs), characterized by a unified end-to-end framework, have exhibited astonishing potential in transforming the recommendation paradigm. Despite their effectiveness, we recognize that GRs are still susceptible to the long-standing issue of popularity bias that has pervaded the recommendation community. Although a few studies have attempted to extend traditional debiasing methods to GRs, their effectiveness is marginal, and the fundamental reason why GRs suffer from popularity bias remains under-explored. To bridge this gap, this study focuses on two core aspects in GRs: the optimization of generative framework and the item tokenization based on semantic index. Based on theoretical analyses, we identify that the severe popularity bias emerges from the confluence of a token-level optimization flaw and the undifferentiated property of item tokenization. Accordingly, this study develops a novel generative recommender system, called Ghost, by designing the asymmetric unlikelihood optimization and the skeleton-founded tokenization. Extensive empirical evaluations across three datasets, alongside multiple SOTA baselines, reveal that Ghost substantially alleviates popularity bias and promotes fairer recommendations, while incurring slight degradation to the overall recommendation utility.

</details>


### [492] [Unlocking Biological Workflows for Robust Protein-Text Question Answering: A Dual-Dimensional RAG Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17261)
*Li Ding,Duanyu Feng,Chen Huang,Yangshuai Wang,Yang Li,Wenqiang Lei,See-Kiong Ng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出2D-ProteinRAG框架，通过融入BLAST生物学工作流和双维度过滤策略（水平细粒度属性对齐+垂直同源性语义去噪），提升了LLM在蛋白质-文本问答任务中的表现，在分布内和分布外基准上均达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM+RAG方法受限于标准RAG流程，依赖静态数据集而非专家验证的生物学工作流（如BLAST），缺乏细粒度信息处理能力，难以泛化到新型（OOD）蛋白质。

Method: 1) 将LLM与BLAST生物学工作流集成；2) 双维度过滤策略：水平细粒度属性对齐（轻量级意图感知判别过滤器修剪无关元数据）+ 垂直同源性语义去噪（层次聚类解决功能矛盾与冗余）。

Result: 在分布内和多种生物OOD基准上，2D-ProteinRAG一致达到SOTA性能，优于微调基线和其他RAG方法。

Conclusion: 验证了框架的鲁棒性和可扩展性，为真实科学场景下的蛋白质功能解读提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Protein-Text Question Answering (QA) is crucial for interpreting biological sequences through natural language. The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that efficiently leverages biological databases and facilitates reasoning offers a potent approach for it. However, constrained by the standard RAG pipeline, these models often rely on curated, static datasets instead of expert-proven biological workflows, lacking the fine-grained information processing and struggling to generalize to novel (OOD) proteins. To bridge this gap, we propose 2D-ProteinRAG, a novel framework that empowers LLMs to operate within the gold-standard biological research workflow (BLAST). To further extract high-quality information from noisy retrieval contexts, we introduce a dual-dimensional (2D) filtering strategy following the expert analytical paradigms. Horizontal Fine-grained Attribute Alignment utilizes a lightweight, intent-aware discriminative filter to prune irrelevant metadata and align database entries with specific user queries. Vertical Homology-based Semantic Denoising resolves functional contradictions and redundancy across multiple homologs via hierarchical clustering. Extensive evaluations on both In-Distribution and diverse biological OOD benchmarks demonstrate that 2D-ProteinRAG consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming fine-tuned baselines and other RAG methods. Our results validate the framework's robustness and scalability, providing a practical solution for interpreting protein functions in real-world scientific scenarios.

</details>


### [493] [RAGR: Review-Augmented Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17267)
*Yingyi Zhang,Junyi Li,Yejing Wang,Wenlin Zhang,Xiaowei Qian,Sheng Zhang,Yue Feng,Yichao Wang,Yong Liu,Xiangyu Zhao,Xianneng Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出RAGR框架，通过将评论文本语义ID与物品语义ID交错排列构成混合行为-语义序列，并引入基于DPO的物品中心任务生成对齐策略，从而在生成式推荐中直接利用评论反馈信号，显著提升推荐性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统序列推荐和生成式推荐都只建模物品交互序列（用户做了什么），忽略了评论反馈（用户为什么这样做）中包含的潜在评价因素，形成了结构性瓶颈。

Method: 1) 评论增强的用户序列建模：将物品语义ID和评论语义ID按时间顺序交错排列，构建混合行为-语义序列；2) 物品中心任务生成对齐：基于DPO优化，鼓励模型在预测位置优先生成物品token而非评论token。

Result: 在三个真实世界数据集上，RAGR相较于强大的GR基线模型在所有评估指标上均取得了一致且显著的提升。

Conclusion: 将评论反馈直接融入生成式用户序列（而非作为辅助特征）能够有效缓解传统建模的结构性瓶颈，为生成式推荐提供了新范式。

Abstract: Sequential recommendation (SR) is traditionally formulated as next-item prediction over a chronological sequence of interacted items. Although recent generative recommendation (GR) methods introduce new machinery, such as semantic IDs, autoregressive decoding, and unified token spaces, they largely inherit the same item-only modeling assumption. We argue that this design constitutes a structural bottleneck, because user decision-making is not purely behavioral: while item interactions reveal what users choose, review feedback often explain why they choose it by exposing latent evaluative factors.
  Motivated by this observation, we propose Review-Augmented Generative Recommendation (RAGR), a novel GR framework that incorporates review feedback directly into the generative user sequence rather than treating reviews as auxiliary side information. Specifically, RAGR introduces a Review-Augmented User Sequence Modeling mechanism that interleaves item semantic IDs and review semantic IDs in chronological order to construct a mixed behavioral-semantic sequence, enabling review signals to participate directly in autoregressive next-token generation. To preserve the recommendation objective, we further introduce an Item-Centric Task Generation Alignment strategy based on direct preference optimization (DPO), which encourages the model to favor item tokens over review tokens at prediction positions. Experiments on three real-world datasets show that RAGR yields consistent and significant gains over strong GR backbones across all metrics. Our code and data are available at \url{https://github.com/Zhang-Yingyi/TKDE_RAGR}.

</details>


### [494] [Text-Guided Visual Representation Learning for Robust Multimodal E-Commerce Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17366)
*Yufei Guo,Jing Ma,Tianlu Zhang,Shijie Yang,Yanlong Zang,Weijie Ding,Pinghua Gong,Jungong Han*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 针对多模态商品检索中图像存在的促销叠加层和背景杂乱问题，提出TGQ-Former框架，利用结构化元数据作为语义指导进行视觉表征学习，通过混合查询连接器解耦元数据锚定与探索性视觉流，并引入轻量级可靠性感知双门控向量调制模块，在真实电商数据集上实现Hit Rate@100提升6.04%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实电商场景中商品图片常含有促销文字和杂乱背景等噪声，导致多模态物品检索鲁棒性下降；尤其在MLRM风格管线中，冻结的视觉编码器需通过轻量连接器聚合视觉token，噪声干扰问题更为突出。

Method: 提出文本引导的Q-Former框架（TGQ-Former）：(1) 混合查询连接器将视觉token提取解耦为元数据锚定流和探索性流；(2) 可靠性感知双门控向量调制模块自适应校准两个流的贡献。

Result: 在大规模真实电商数据集的全库检索实验中，TGQ-Former显著优于强基准连接器和端到端MLLM，Hit Rate@100平均提升6.04%。

Conclusion: 文本引导的视觉编码能有效提升多模态检索的鲁棒性，结构化元数据可作为有价值的语义指导信号。

Abstract: Multimodal item embeddings are crucial for e-commerce item-to-item (I2I) retrieval, yet real-world product images often contain promotional overlays and background clutter that inject spurious visual cues and degrade retrieval robustness. This issue is particularly pronounced in MLRM-style pipelines, where a frozen vision encoder is connected to an LLM through a lightweight connector that must selectively aggregate visual tokens. We propose Text-Guided Q-Former (TGQ-Former), a text-guided visual representation learning framework that leverages structured metadata as semantic guidance for visual token extraction while preserving complementary visual evidence. Concretely, TGQ-Former employs a hybrid-query connector to disentangle metadata-anchored and exploratory visual streams, and introduces a lightweight reliability-aware dual-gated vector modulation module to adaptively calibrate their contributions under noisy inputs. Experiments on large-scale, real-world e-commerce datasets with full-pool retrieval show that TGQ-Former consistently outperforms strong connector baselines and end-to-end MLLMs. On average, it improves Hit Rate@100 (H@100) by 6.04%, demonstrating the effectiveness of text-guided visual encoding for robust multimodal retrieval.

</details>


### [495] [MARQUIS: A Three-Stage Pipeline for Video Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17640)
*Debashish Chakraborty,Dengjia Zhang,Jialiang Jin,Hanting Liu,Katherine Guerrerio,Hanxiang Qin,Tyler Skow,Alexander Martin,Reno Kriz,Benjamin Van Durme*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出MARQUIS三阶段流水线，通过查询扩展与重排序、校准式结构化证据提取、以及受控文章生成，显著提升视频检索增强生成性能。在MAGMaR2026任务上，检索nDCG@10从0.195提升至0.759；文章生成的人类评分从3.09提升至3.83。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频检索增强生成系统在面对复杂、多层面的查询时，检索方法因单一嵌入无法捕获完整语义而失败；生成方法则缺乏跨视频推理能力，且面临长多视频语境下的记忆约束。

Method: 三阶段流水线：(1) 查询扩展、融合与重排序，(2) 校准式结构化证据提取，(3) 基于提取证据的文章生成，可选由RLM控制。

Result: MAGMaR2026共享任务上，检索nDCG@10从0.195提升至0.759；ITER-QA-BASE将平均人类评分从3.09提升至3.83；MARQUIS-RLM人类评分3.30，且非QA系统中引用召回率最高。

Conclusion: MARQUIS有效解决了视频检索增强生成中检索和生成两端的核心瓶颈，验证了查询扩展、结构化证据提取与受控生成相结合的有效性。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation from videos requires systems to retrieve relevant audiovisual evidence from large corpora and synthesize it into coherent, attributed text. Current approaches struggle at both ends: retrieval methods fail on complex, multi-faceted queries that cannot be captured by a single embedding, while generation methods lack the high-level reasoning needed to synthesize across multiple videos and face memory constraints over long, multi-video contexts. We present MARQUIS: a three-stage pipeline that addresses these limitations through (1) query expansion, fusion, and reranking, (2) calibrated structured evidence extraction, and (3) article generation from extracted evidence, optionally controlled by an RLM. On the MAGMaR2026 shared task, we improve retrieval performance from 0.195 to 0.759 (nDCG@10). For article generation, ITER-QA-BASE improves average human score from 3.09 to 3.83 over the CAG baseline, while MARQUIS-RLM achieves a human score of 3.30 and the strongest citation recall among non-QA systems.

</details>


### [496] [Uncertainty-Calibrated Recommendations for Low-Active Users](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17788)
*Bob Junyi Zou,Sai Li,Tianyun Sun,Wentao Guo,Qinglei Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个生产级框架，通过校准模型不确定性来平衡推荐系统的可靠性（低活跃用户）与多样性（高活跃用户），在大规模直播平台验证了显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推荐系统面临的根本挑战是：如何为低活跃用户（LAU）保证推荐可靠性，同时为高活跃用户（HAU）提供推荐多样性。模型不确定性可以同时服务于这两个目标。

Method: 提出统一的生产级不确定性校准框架，对LAU实施基于不确定性的风险厌恶去增强策略（抑制不可靠推荐），对HAU采用风险寻求的UCB策略（鼓励探索）。

Result: 在大规模直播平台验证，LAU的留存（活跃时长）和满意度（优质观看时长比例）显著提升，HAU的兴趣多样性和类别覆盖率显著增加。

Conclusion: 不确定性感知的推荐在工业场景中具有重要价值，能够有效兼顾不同活跃度用户的需求。

Abstract: A fundamental challenge in recommender systems is balancing reliability for Low-Active Users (LAUs) with diversity for High-Active Users (HAUs). The key to this balance lies in quantifying model uncertainty, which approximates the risk of prediction errors and reveals the limits of the model's current knowledge. On large-scale short-video and livestream platforms, model uncertainty can warn of low-quality recommendations that may lead to disengagement of LAUs and at the same time identify opportunities to diversify content recommendation for HAUs. To leverage this dichotomy, we introduce a unified, production-ready framework that calibrates uncertainty to drive differentiated strategies. Specifically, we implement a model-uncertainty-based risk-averse deboosting policy for LAUs to suppress unreliable recommendations, while employing a risk-seeking Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) strategy for HAUs to encourage exploration. Validated on a major livestream platform, our framework demonstrates significant improvements in retention (active hours) and satisfaction (quality watch time ratio) for LAUs as well as remarkable increases in interest diversity and category coverage for HAUs, proving the value of uncertainty-aware recommendation in industrial settings.

</details>


### [497] [DADF: A Distribution-Aware Debiasing Framework for Watch-Time Regression in Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17863)
*Yiqing Yang,Xinlong Zhao,Zhao Liu,Xiao Lv,Ruiming Tang,Han Li,Kun Gai*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: DADF是一种针对短视频推荐系统中观看时长回归任务的两阶段分布感知去偏框架，通过动态分布感知变换、去偏因子感知模块和多标签感知模块，有效缓解长尾标签下的局部校准偏差，在工业场景中实现了显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有观看时长预测模型在全局上可能表现校准，但在短观看和长观看区域存在系统性残差偏差（高估短观看、低估长观看），因为相反方向的误差在整体上相互抵消。现有方法主要改进第一阶段预测器，但未能充分纠正这种残差分布偏差。

Method: DADF在已有预测器之上进行第二阶段乘法残差校正，包含三个核心模块：1）动态分布感知变换（稳定长尾校正目标）；2）去偏因子感知模块（利用推理时可观测因素如视频时长建模异构残差模式）；3）多标签感知模块（利用来自用户参与度头的辅助预测信号）。

Result: 在公开短视频基准和工业级排名系统上，DADF一致提升了点精度和排序质量。工业场景中，WUAUC提升1.88个百分点，MAE降低12.57%，在线A/B测试中每设备平均观看时长提升0.347%（统计显著）。

Conclusion: DADF有效缓解了局部校准偏差，为长尾连续目标的去偏提供了一个实用的即插即用解决方案。

Abstract: Watch-time prediction is a central regression task in short-video recommender systems, where labels are highly long-tailed and residual errors vary systematically across observed watch-time regions. In practice, a model may appear globally calibrated while still overestimating short views and underestimating long views, because opposite errors cancel out in aggregate. Existing methods mainly improve the first-stage watch-time predictor, but often leave such residual distributional bias insufficiently corrected. We propose DADF, a distribution-aware debiasing framework for watch-time regression. Instead of replacing a deployed predictor, DADF performs second-stage multiplicative residual correction on top of it. DADF combines three complementary designs: a dynamic distribution-aware transformation for stabilizing long-tailed correction targets, a debias-factor-aware module for modeling heterogeneous residual patterns using inference-time observable factors, especially video duration, and a multi-label-aware module that exploits auxiliary prediction signals from engagement heads. We evaluate DADF on public short-video benchmarks and a large-scale industrial ranking system. DADF consistently improves both pointwise accuracy and ranking quality across datasets and backbones. In the industrial setting, it achieves a 1.88 percentage-point WUAUC gain over the production baseline, reduces MAE by 12.57%, and yields a statistically significant 0.347% lift in average time spent per device in online A/B testing. These results demonstrate that DADF effectively mitigates local calibration bias and provides a practical plug-in solution for debiasing long-tailed continuous targets. The source code is available at https://github.com/liuzhao09/DADF.

</details>


### [498] [Text-Video Retrieval With Global-Local Contrastive Consistency Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17959)
*Xiaolun Jing,Xinxing Yang,Genke Yang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出GLCCL方法，通过无参的全局-局部交互模块和对比分数一致性损失，实现文本-视频检索中的语义对齐，在三个基准数据集上取得优异效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本-视频检索方法依赖语言-视频注意力模块进行对齐，但计算开销大、检索效率低；且视频内容比文本更丰富，文本-视频对常存在部分语义不匹配的问题。

Method: 提出GLCCL框架：(1) 无参的全局-局部交互模块(GLIM)，以文本引导方式生成语义相关的帧级和视频级特征；(2) 对比分数一致性(CSC)损失，促进正样本对上的分数一致性学习，抑制负样本对上的一致性。

Result: 在MSR-VTT、DiDeMo和VATEX三个基准数据集上，通过大量实验验证了方法的有效性和优越性。

Conclusion: CSC损失赋予模型区分正样本与难负样本的鲁棒判别能力，所提方法在检索性能与计算效率之间取得良好平衡。

Abstract: Text-video retrieval aims to find the most semantically similar videos with given text queries. However, since videos contain more diverse content than texts, the main semantics expressed by each text-video pair is often partially relevant. The primary methods involve the utilization of language-video attention module to align texts and videos. Though effective, this paradigm inevitably introduces prohibitive computational overhead, resulting in inefficient retrieval. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method called Global-Local Contrastive Consistency Learning (GLCCL) to achieve texts and videos semantics alignment. Specifically, we design a parameter-free Global-Local Interaction Module (GLIM) to generate semantic-related frame and video features in a text-guided manner. Furthermore, a Contrastive Score Consistency (CSC) loss is developed to promote consistency learning among different scores on positive pairs and suppress consistency learning on negative pairs. Empirical evidence suggests that CSC loss provides the model with robust discriminative power between positives and hard negatives. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets, including MSR-VTT, DiDeMo and VATEX, demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our approach.

</details>


### [499] [Towards Sustainable Growth: A Multi-Value-Aware Retrieval Framework for E-Commerce Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17994)
*Yifan Wang,Yixuan Wang,YiDan Liang,Qiang Liu,Fei Xiao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出GrowthGR框架，通过ItemLTV模块用反事实推断量化长期交易价值，以及MultiGR模块用多值感知策略优化对齐搜索系统多阶段价值，在淘宝生产平台实现新品GMV提升5.3%，整体搜索GMV提升0.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有冷启动模型存在训练目标与线上业务指标不一致的问题，且缺乏有效衡量商品增长潜力的机制，导致"马太效应"加剧，新品难以获得曝光。

Method: 1) ItemLTV模块：利用反事实推断量化单次用户交互带来的长期价值增量；2) MultiGR模块：基于语义ID的生成式检索架构，结合搜索级联信号构建结构化样本，采用多值感知策略优化(MoPO)对齐多阶段线上价值，平衡短期交易价值与长期增长潜力。

Result: 在淘宝生产平台部署后，新品GMV提升5.3%，整体搜索GMV提升0.3%。

Conclusion: GrowthGR有效平衡了短期转化与长期商品增长，对整体生态系统价值产生了积极影响。

Abstract: New item growth is critical for maintaining a healthy ecosystem in large-scale e-commerce platforms. However, existing systems tend to prioritize presenting users with already popular items, a phenomenon often referred to as the "Matthew effect". In the context of search retrieval, current cold-start models suffer from the misalignment between training objectives and online business metrics, and they lack effective mechanisms to measure an item's growth potential. In this paper, we propose a Multi-Value-Aware retrieval framework tailored for e-commerce search, designed to better align with the cascaded online values across different stages of the search system while balancing immediate conversion and long-term item growth. Our framework GrowthGR consists of two key components: an Item Long-term Transaction Value Prediction (ItemLTV) module and a Multi-Value-Aware Generative Retrieval (MultiGR) module. First, in the ItemLTV module, we employ counterfactual inference to quantify the long-term value increment attributable to a single user interaction. Second, in the MultiGR module, building upon a semantic-ID-based generative retrieval architecture, we leverage structured samples with the search cascade signals and adopt a Multi-Value-Aware Policy Optimization (MoPO) training paradigm to align with multi-stage online values, while explicitly balancing short-term transactional value and long-term growth potential estimated by ItemLTV. We successfully deployed GrowthGR on Taobao's production platform, achieving a substantial 5.3% lift in new item GMV while delivering a non-trivial 0.3% gain in overall search GMV. Extensive online analysis and A/B testing demonstrate its positive impact on the overall ecosystem value.

</details>


### [500] [PIPER: Content-Based Table Search via profiling and LLM-Generated Pseudoqueries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18199)
*Riccardo Terrenzi,Matteo Falconi,Serkan Ayvaz,Pierluigi Plebani*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出PIPER方法，利用LLM生成表格概要并构建密集检索，解决元数据缺失环境下表格数据集的检索问题，超越传统方法和TableQA检索方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格搜索系统主要依赖元数据，但元数据常不完整或质量低；而LLM虽能提供更丰富的内容表示，但现有LLM检索方法聚焦于表格问答（选单个表回答问题），而非对多个数据集进行检索和排序。因此需要一种适用于元数据缺失场景的内容驱动表格检索方法。

Method: 提出PIPER方法，利用LLM为表格生成概要（table profiles），并结合LLM生成的查询，通过密集检索（dense retrieval）进行内容驱动的表格数据集检索和排序。

Result: 在元数据缺失场景下，PIPER超越了经典的基于元数据的基线方法以及强TableQA检索方法。

Conclusion: LLM-based内容建模在表格数据集搜索中具有重要价值，PIPER证明了这一点。

Abstract: The rapid growth of tabular datasets in data lakes, data spaces, and open data portals makes effective dataset search essential for reuse and analysis. Existing search systems rely mainly on metadata, which is often incomplete or low quality, especially for tables whose meaning depends on both schema and cell values. Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) enable richer, content-based representations of tables. However, prior LLM-based retrieval methods have focused on Table Question Answering, where the goal is to select a single table to answer a question, rather than retrieve and rank relevant datasets. We propose PIPER, a content-driven retrieval method for tabular datasets that uses table profiles and LLM-generated queries embedded for dense retrieval. Designed for dataset search in poor-metadata settings, PIPER outperforms both classical metadata-based baselines and strong TableQA retrieval methods, demonstrating the value of LLM-based content modeling for tabular dataset search.

</details>


### [501] [RCTEA: Richness-guided Co-training for Temporal Entity Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18255)
*Jiayun Li,Wen Hua,Shiqi Fan,Fengmei Jin,Haiyang Jiang,Xue Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出RCTEA框架，通过丰富度引导的注意力机制、自适应加权策略和双视图邻域共识算法，联合建模TKG的结构与时间特征，实现最先进的时间实体对齐性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TEA模型未能捕捉结构与时间特征的正交互补效应，且忽略了信息丰富度对神经特征编码器中消息传递的重要性。

Method: 1) 丰富度引导的注意力机制；2) 自适应加权策略用于特征融合；3) 双视图邻域共识算法，联合优化特征编码器以保持局部结构一致性。

Result: 在公开TEA基准上达到最先进性能，实验证明了RCTEA的优越性。

Conclusion: RCTEA通过联合建模结构与时间特征并引入丰富度指导，有效解决了现有方法的局限性，显著提升了实体对齐效果。

Abstract: Temporal Entity Alignment (TEA), which aims to identify equivalent entities across Temporal Knowledge Graphs (TKGs), is crucial for integrating knowledge facts from multiple sources. However, existing TEA models often fail to capture the orthogonal yet complementary effects between structural and temporal features, and typically overlook the importance of information richness, a key factor for effective message passing in neural feature encoders. To address these limitations, we propose the RCTEA framework, which jointly models both structural and temporal aspects of TKGs for entity alignment. Specifically, we design a richness-guided attention mechanism along with an adaptive weighting strategy to facilitate effective feature fusion. To ensure robust alignment despite noisy entity contexts, we introduce a dual-view neighborhood consensus algorithm that jointly refines the feature encoders to enforce local structural consistency of the predicted alignments. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of RCTEA, achieving state-of-the-art performance on public TEA benchmarks.

</details>


### [502] [TIGER-FG: Text-Guided Implicit Fine-Grained Grounding for E-commerce Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18434)
*Xinyu Sun,Huangyu Dai,Lingtao Mao,Zexin Zheng,Zihan Liang,Ben Chen,Chenyi Lei,Wenwu Ou*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出TIGER-FG框架，通过文本引导的隐式细粒度对齐方法解决电商图像检索中的模态和粒度不对称问题，在两个新基准上分别提升Recall@1达6.1%和34.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电商图像检索存在双重不对称性：(1) 模态不对称——视觉查询需匹配图像-文本多模态商品；(2) 粒度不对称——裁剪查询需与含背景干扰的完整图像比较。现有检测方案有额外成本与误差累积，CLIP类编码器易受背景影响。

Method: 提出TIGER-FG框架，核心是文本引导的隐式细粒度对齐机制：(1) 利用商品文本作为语义引导，生成目标聚焦的商品表示，无需目标检测；(2) 引入双重蒸馏目标，保持目标区域空间一致性和查询-商品相似度结构。同时构建10M规模训练集和两个评估基准ECom-RF-IMMR。

Result: 在两个评估基准上，TIGER-FG相比最强基线分别提升Recall@1达6.1和34.4个百分点，仅需85.7M查询侧参量和256维嵌入。在公开电商基准上亦表现出泛化能力。

Conclusion: TIGER-FG有效解决了图像到多模态检索中的不对称问题，在保持轻量级（85.7M参数、256维嵌入）的同时显著提升了检索精度，特别是对复杂布局场景。

Abstract: E-commerce image search often takes a cropped image as the query, while each candidate is represented by full item images and structured text. This image-to-multimodal retrieval setting presents two asymmetries: a modality disparity -- a visual query must match image--text items, and a granularity disparity -- a cropped query must be compared with full images containing background context and possible distractors. Detection-based pipelines handle the granularity disparity through explicit localization but incur extra cost and error propagation, whereas CLIP-style encoders avoid detection, but are vulnerable to backgrounds or irrelevant items. To address these limitations, we propose TIGER-FG, a text-guided implicit fine-grained grounding framework for image-to-multimodal e-commerce retrieval. TIGER-FG uses item text as semantic guidance to produce target-focused item representations without object detection for retrieval. We further introduce dual distillation objectives that preserve target-region spatial consistency and query--item similarity structure, yielding more stable and discriminative multimodal representations. In addition, we construct ECom-RF-IMMR, a realistic benchmark suite with a 10M-pair training set and two evaluation benchmarks covering standard and cluttered item layouts. TIGER-FG improves Recall@1 over the strongest baseline by 6.1 and 34.4 percentage points on the two evaluation benchmarks, respectively, with only 85.7M query-side parameters and 256-dim embeddings. Results on public e-commerce benchmarks further demonstrate its generalization to noisy and one-to-many retrieval scenarios. Code and data will be released.

</details>


### [503] [Improving BM25 Code Retrieval Under Fixed Generic Tokenization: Adaptive q-Log Odds as a Drop-In BM25 Fix](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18561)
*Santosh Kumar Radha,Oktay Goktas*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出用q-logarithm替换BM25中的对数IDF，在代码检索中显著提升NDCG@10（+89.3%），且对文本检索影响极小，通过hapax密度可自动估计最优q值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在检索增强编码中，BM25的IDF无法有效区分代码中的标识符差异（如函数名），导致相关文件常被遗漏在检索上下文之外。作者希望改进BM25以提升代码检索效果。

Method: 将BM25中Robertson-Spärck-Jones odds的外层对数替换为q-logarithm（q=1时恢复原BM25，q<1时等价于Box-Cox变换）。通过hapax密度估计最优q值，仅需一次稀疏矩阵遍历。

Result: 在CoIR CodeSearchNet Go数据集上，NDCG@10从0.2575提升至0.4874（绝对+0.2299，相对+89.3%），p≤10^-4。对BEIR文本检索影响近乎为零。标识符感知的分词可消除q-IDF的增益。

Conclusion: q-IDF是一种简单有效的BM25改进方法，特别适合代码检索场景，且几乎不增加计算成本。该方法揭示了BM25在代码领域与文本领域的根本差异。

Abstract: In retrieval-augmented coding, failures often begin when the relevant file is absent from the retrieved context. Under frozen generic tokenization, where a BM25 index has been built by a search system whose analyzer the practitioner does not control, this failure is routine: BM25's logarithmic RSJ-odds IDF under-separates the identifier tail that distinguishes one function from another. We replace the outer logarithm of the Robertson-Spärck-Jones odds with a q-logarithm. At q=1 the transform recovers BM25 exactly by L'Hôpital's rule, and for q<1 it is a Box-Cox transform of the RSJ odds with lambda = 1-q. On CoIR CodeSearchNet Go (182K documents), oracle-tuned NDCG@10 rises from 0.2575 to 0.4874 (absolute +0.2299; +89.3% relative; zero sign reversals in 10,000 paired-bootstrap resamples, reported as p <= 10^-4). The effect is graded across code languages and is near-zero on BEIR text. A one-parameter closed form estimates a corpus-level q from hapax density and stays near q=1 on corpora where BM25 is already optimal. The index-time cost is a single pass over the sparse score matrix and query latency is unchanged. A tokenizer ablation shows that identifier-aware tokenization largely removes the incremental gain from q-IDF.

</details>


### [504] [Traditional statistical representations outperform generative AI in identifying expert peer reviewers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18752)
*Vicente Amado Olivo,Tereza Jerabkova,Jakub Klencki,John Carpenter,Mario Malički,Ferdinando Patat,Louis-Gregory Strolger,Wolfgang Kerzendorf*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本研究对比统计方法与生成式AI在同行评审专家识别任务上的表现，发现传统TF-IDF方法（79.5%准确率）远超GPT-4o mini（51.5%），统计方法在细分领域专家识别上仍优于大语言模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学投稿指数级增长导致同行评审系统压力巨大，传统人工识别专家方式已不可行，机构开始借助LLM自动化专家识别流程，但缺乏对这些模型可靠性的严格评估。

Method: 将专家识别定义为信息检索问题，利用大型国际天文观测台分布式评审系统中提案作者身份作为领域专长的代理真实标注，评估六种检索方法（统计方法与AI方法）在专家识别上的表现。

Result: TF-IDF在Top-25推荐中成功识别标注专家79.5%的时间，而GPT-4o mini仅为51.5%。统计表示方法显著优于生成式AI。

Conclusion: 在细分科学领域专家识别任务中，透明、可复现的统计表示方法仍优于计算昂贵的LLM；区分子领域专长需要细粒度词汇，而生成方法的语义平滑模糊了这一关键信息。

Abstract: The exponential growth of scientific submissions has strained the peer review system. Despite the rapidly expanding global pool of researchers, this unprecedented scale has rendered the previous approach of manual expert identification unfeasible. Therefore, institutions have naturally turned to Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate intricate processes like expert reviewer identification. However, the reliability of these new models in accurately identifying domain experts lacks rigorous evaluation. We conduct a comprehensive empirical evaluation of statistical and AI-driven expertise identification methodologies to benchmark their reliability and limitations. Framing expert identification as an information retrieval problem, we utilize the distributed peer review system of a major international astronomical observatory, where proposal authorship serves as our proxy ground truth for domain expertise. Evaluating six retrieval methodologies utilized across observatories and computer science conferences, we demonstrate that traditional statistical representations outperform generative AI. Specifically, Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency successfully identified a labeled expert within the top 25 recommendations 79.5% of the time, compared to 51.5% for GPT-4o mini. Our results highlight that distinguishing subfield expertise requires fine-grained vocabulary, which is obscured by the semantic smoothing in generative methods. By establishing a rigorous evaluation framework for automated peer review, we demonstrate that transparent and reproducible statistical representations still outperform computationally expensive LLMs in specialized scientific tasks.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [505] [Evolutionary Extreme Learning Machine of ab-initio Energy Landscapes for Crystal Structure Prediction using Manta Ray Optimization with Levy Flight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17148)
*Adrian Rubio-Solis*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进的蝠鲼觅食优化算法（MRFO）结合莱维飞行（Levy Flight），用于训练极限学习机（ELM）以预测二元体系中纯组分晶体结构的松弛与非松弛形成能。该算法通过莱维飞行增强种群多样性，避免过早收敛和局部最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对极限学习机（ELM）训练中容易陷入局部最优和过早收敛的问题，提出利用改进的MRFO算法（结合莱维飞行）来优化ELM的输入权重，以提高预测准确性和模型鲁棒性。

Method: 提出EELM-MRFO-LF方法：首先使用带有莱维飞行的MRFO算法选择ELM的输入权重；然后利用Moore-Penrose广义逆解析计算输出权重；莱维飞行用于增加种群多样性，防止过早收敛。

Result: 将EELM-MRFO-LF与其他已知自然启发算法在相同条件下进行比较，验证了该方法的优越性能。

Conclusion: EELM-MRFO-LF结合了MRFO的搜索能力和莱维飞行的多样性增强机制，在预测二元体系形成能方面表现优于传统算法。

Abstract: The Manta Ray Foraging Optimization algorithm (MRFO) has proven to be a powerful heuristic strategy in the optimal solution of a large number of engineering problems. In this paper, an improvement of MRFO with Levy Flight is suggested for the training of extreme learning machines (ELMs) whose basic model is a Single Layer Feedforward Network (SLFN). The proposed methodology that we called Evolutionary EELM-MRFO-LF for short is implemented to the prediction of unrelaxed and relaxed formation energy compounds relative to ground state crystal structure of pure components in binary systems. EELM-MRFO-LF follows the learning procedure of traditional Evolutionary ELMs in which first MRFO with LF is used to select the input weights and Moore-Penrose (MP) generalized inverse is applied to analytically determine the output weights. Levy Flight trajectory is implemented for increasing the diversity of the population of ELMs against premature convergence and the ability of avoiding getting trapped in a local optima. The performance of the suggested EELM-MRFO-LF is compared with other well-known nature-inspired algorithms under similar conditions.

</details>


### [506] [Adaptive Stochastic Natural Gradient Method for Safe Optimization on Binary Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17925)
*Kento Uchida,Ryoki Hamano,Masahiro Nomura,Shinichi Shirakawa*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出Safe ASNG方法，通过Walsh函数估计安全函数的Lipschitz常数，构建二进制搜索空间的安全区域，从而在优化过程中有效抑制不安全解的评价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实工程与医疗领域的优化问题中，解的评价可能涉及风险。现有连续空间的安全优化方法已较成熟，但二进制搜索空间的安全优化算法发展不足。

Method: 基于自适应随机自然梯度方法（ASNG），引入安全优化机制。利用离散Walsh函数构建安全函数的代理模型，估计关于汉明距离的Lipschitz常数；计算安全区域，将新生成的解投影到安全区域内的最近邻，从而抑制不安全解的评价。

Result: 在二进制基准问题的实验中，对比方法未能有效抑制不安全解评价，而Safe ASNG在实现高效优化的同时，有效抑制了不安全解的评价。

Conclusion: Safe ASNG成功将安全优化机制扩展到二进制搜索空间，证明了在二进制域中进行安全优化的可行性。

Abstract: Optimization problems in real-world applications across the medical and engineering domains often involve potential risks when evaluating candidate solutions. Safe optimization aims to perform optimization while suppressing unsafe solution evaluations in such situations. For continuous search spaces, there exist safe optimization methods based on evolutionary computation. However, the algorithm development of safe optimization methods for binary search spaces has not been adequately addressed. In this study, we incorporate additional mechanisms for safe optimization into a binary optimization method, the adaptive stochastic natural gradient method (ASNG) with a family of Bernoulli distributions. For safety functions that must be kept non-negative during optimization, the proposed method, safe ASNG, estimates the Lipschitz constants with respect to the Hamming distance by constructing surrogate models of safety functions based on discrete Walsh functions. Then, safe ASNG computes a safe region that consists of safe solutions around the previously evaluated safe solutions. By projecting newly generated solutions to their nearest neighbors within the safe region, safe ASNG suppresses unsafe solution evaluations.
